5721(1) -1
5722(1) null Your character begins restricted to the areas of Misthalin and Karamja. As you complete tasks, you can unlock more areas.|Full information about each of the areas can be found in the Area Selection Menu. This can be accessed from the Leagues Menu in the Journal Panel.|All experience gained is heavily increased, and this will further increase as you unlock more Relics.|Content released during Leagues V will be reviewed and enabled for the League on a case-by-case basis.|Combat Masteries offer customizeable combat power, earnt via various milestone challenges.|Each area has an Echo Boss, these are enhanced bosses that pose a challenge and drop new unique rewards, you can kill the regular boss to get an Echo Orb that lets you access the Echo variant, more information can be found in the area interfaces.|Leagues V: Raging Echoes will run from November 27th 2024 until the game update on January 22th 2025.', '1': 'Your character is an Ironman, meaning you cannot trade with other players.|You will start off with Misthalin and Karamja unlocked, with everything those areas provide you.|You will start with the following stat increases: |- 3 Herblore
- 5 Runecraft|A Dramen Staff will be added to your Inventory so that you can access Zanaris. If lost, you can reclaim it from the Sage in Lumbridge.', '2': 'Slayer Masters will assign you the same tasks, taking into account the areas you have currently unlocked.|Teleports and transportation methods to locations outside of areas you have unlocked are restricted.|When purchasing your Player Owned House it will be accessible from Brimhaven. Your house can only be moved to areas you have unlocked.|Unlocking new areas will complete various quests and Achievement Diary tasks but will not award any quest completion XP. However, you may complete some quests on your own to gain their XP before unlocking the area which auto-completes it.|Most shop stock will not deplete.|The following shop stocks have been modified:
- Elemental Shields have been added to all Slayer Equipment shops|Impling spawn rates have been increased.|Rarity of rare implings has been increased.|Dragon implings drop reduced Dragon Bones.|All Soulreaper Axe pieces will drop from every Desert Treasure 2 Boss.|Pets and any pet transmog items that roll over between leagues do not count towards the collection log tasks.|The Twisted Bow, Scythe of Vitur, and Tumeken's Shadow are available from all three raids.|Items that drop as components that require multiple regions to create a usable item will drop as the finished item.|CoX: CM, ToB: HM and ToA 500+ have significantly buffed drop rates and difficulty, ToA and ToB will now provide uniques to all players in the raid if the raid obtains one.|Pet Transmogs will now roll over between leagues.|The Sage can sell Max Capes once you are eligible.|Nihil Shards drop in increased quantity from Nex.|Players can access Tormented Demons without WGS completed.|Scythe of Vitur can be charged with just blood runes.|Zulrah has no damage cap or melee damage immunity.|Forestry Events are three times as likely to spawn.|Wilderness Bosses can be accessed without the Wilderness Medium Diary.'}

map {'35': 'Sanctuary: Temporarily increase your Defence level by 8.', '805': 'Chainhit: Throw an axe which hits your target and then chains to hit further nearby targets, costing 10% additional special attack per extra target.', '859': 'Powershot: Deal an attack that is guaranteed to hit your target.', '861': 'Snapshot: Fire two arrows within quick succession, but with reduced accuracy.', '1215': 'Puncture: Deal two quick slashes with 15% increased accuracy and 15% increased damage.', '1231': 'Puncture: Deal two quick slashes with 15% increased accuracy and 15% increased damage.', '1249': 'Shove: Push your target back and stun them for 3 seconds. This attack deals no damage.', '1263': 'Shove: Push your target back and stun them for 3 seconds. This attack deals no damage.', '1305': 'Cleave: Deal a powerful attack that inflicts 25% more damage.', '1377': 'Rampage: Drain your Attack, Defence, Ranged & Magic levels by 10%, while increasing your Strength by 10 levels, plus 25% of the drained levels.', '1434': 'Shatter: Increase damage by 50% and accuracy by 25% for one hit.', '3101': 'Impale: Deal an attack with 10% increased Attack and Strength, but with a slower speed.', '3176': 'Shove: Push your target back and stun them for 3 seconds. This attack deals no damage.', '3204': 'Sweep: If your target is small, adjacent targets may be hit too. Otherwise, your target may be hit a second time, with 25% decreased accuracy. Damage in all cases is increased by 10% of your max hit.', '4151': 'Energy Drain: Deal an attack with 25% increased accuracy that siphons 10% of your target's run energy.', '4153': 'Quick Smash: Deal an extra attack instantly.', '4587': 'Sever: Deal a slash with increased accuracy that prevents your target from using protection prayers for 5 seconds if it successfully hits.', '5680': 'Puncture: Deal two quick slashes with 15% increased accuracy and 15% increased damage.', '5698': 'Puncture: Deal two quick slashes with 15% increased accuracy and 15% increased damage.', '5716': 'Shove: Push your target back and stun them for 3 seconds. This attack deals no damage.', '5730': 'Shove: Push your target back and stun them for 3 seconds. This attack deals no damage.', '6724': 'Soulshot: Deal an attack that is guaranteed to hit your target and lowers your target's Magic level by the damage dealt.', '6739': 'Lumber Up: Increase your Woodcutting level by 3.', '6746': 'Weaken: Temporarily drain your target's Attack, Strength and Defence by 5%. Is twice as effective against demons.', '7158': 'Powerstab: Hit up to fourteen enemies surrounding you.', '7639': 'Retainer: Traps a vampyre juvenile or juvinate provided they have 50% or less hitpoints remaining.', '7640': 'Retainer: Traps a vampyre juvenile or juvinate provided they have 50% or less hitpoints remaining.', '7641': 'Retainer: Traps a vampyre juvenile or juvinate provided hitpoints remaining.', '8872': 'Backstab: Deal an attack with greatly increased accuracy on unsuspecting targets and that lowers your target's Defence level by the damage dealt.', '8874': 'Backstab: Deal an attack with greatly increased accuracy on unsuspecting targets and that lowers your target's Defence level by the damage dealt.', '8876': 'Backstab: Deal an attack with greatly increased accuracy on unsuspecting targets and that lowers your target's Defence level by the damage dealt.', '8878': 'Backstab: Deal an attack with greatly increased accuracy on unsuspecting targets and that damage dealt.', '10284': 'Powershot: Deal an attack that is guaranteed to hit your target.', '10887': 'Sunder: Deal an attack with double accuracy and 10% higher max hit. Lowers your target's Attack, Defence, Ranged or Magic level by 10% of the damage dealt.', '11037': 'Liquify: Deal an attack with double the chance of hitting that boosts your Strength, Attack and Defence levels by 25% of the damage dealt. Can only be used underwater.', '11061': 'Favour of the War God: Deal an attack which hits through Protect from Melee and siphons Prayer points equal to the damage dealt.', '11235': 'Descent of Darkness: Deal a double attack that inflicts up to 30% more damage (minimum damage of 5 per hit).', '11785': 'Armadyl Eye: Deal an attack with double accuracy, also doubles the base activation chance of enchanted bolt effects.', '11791': 'Power of Death: Reduce all melee damage you receive by 50% for the next minute while the staff remains equipped. Stacks with Protect from Melee.', '11802': 'The Judgement: Deal an attack that inflicts 37.5% more damage with double accuracy.', '11804': 'Warstrike: Deal an attack, with double accuracy, that inflicts 21% more damage and drains one of your target's combat stats by the damage dealt.', '11806': 'Healing Blade: Deal an attack that inflicts 10% more damage with double accuracy, while restoring your Hitpoints and Prayer by 50% and 25% of the damage dealt respectively.', '11808': 'Ice Cleave: Deal an attack that inflicts 10% more damage with double accuracy and freezes your target for 20 seconds if it successfully hits.', '11824': 'Shove: Push your target back and stun them for 3 seconds. This attack deals no damage.', '11838': 'Saradomin's Lightning: Call upon Saradomin's power to perform an attack that inflicts 10% more melee damage and 1-16 extra magic damage.', '11889': 'Shove: Push your target back and stun them for 3 seconds. Stacks with Protect from Melee.', '22398': 'Retainer: Traps a vampyre juvenile or juvinate provided they have 50% or less hitpoints remaining.', '22516': 'Pulsate: Fire an incredibly powerful burst of energy.', '22610': 'Spear Wall: All damage dealt by this attack is reduced by 50%, but will damage up to sixteen targets surrounding you. After using this attack, you will be immune from melee attacks for 5 seconds.', '22613': 'Feint: Deal an attack which treats your target's defence as if it was reduced by 75%. It will deal a minimum of 20% extra damage.', '22622': 'Smash: Deal an attack which deals a minimum of 25% extra damage and lowers your target's Defence level by 30%.', '22634': 'Hamstring: Deal a minimum of 20% extra damage and hamstring player targets, causing them to lose run energy 6x faster for 1 minute.', '22636': 'Phantom Strike: This does nothing vs non-player targets. As well as dealing a regular attack, your target will suffer that damage again over time.', '22731': 'Unleash: Deal an attack which has 5% increased accuracy and 2.5% increased strength per 5% of the special attack bar used.', '22734': 'Unleash: Deal an attack which has 5% increased accuracy and 2.5% increased strength per 5% of the special attack bar used.', '22737': 'Unleash: Deal an attack which has 5% increased accuracy and 2.5% increased strength per 5% of the special attack bar used.', '22740': 'Unleash: Deal an attack which has 5% increased accuracy and 2.5% increased strength per 5% of the special attack bar used.', '22743': 'Unleash: Deal an attack which has 5% increased accuracy and 2.5% increased strength per 5% of the special attack bar used.', '22804': 'Duality: Throws two knives at your opponent.', '22806': 'Duality: Throws two knives at your opponent.', '22808': 'Duality: Throws two knives at your opponent.', '22810': 'Duality: Throws two knives at your opponent.', '23611': 'Armadyl Eye: Deal an attack with double accuracy, also doubles the base activation chance of enchanted bolt effects.', '23613': 'Power of Death: Reduce all melee damage you receive by 50% for the next minute while the staff remains equipped. Damage scales based upon magic level and can be increased with magic damage boosting equipment. Costs no runes to use.', '24425': 'Invocate: Fire a powerful spell that restores your prayer points by 50% of the damage dealt. Damage scales based upon magic level and can be increased with magic damage boosting equipment. Your prayer points can go above your level, to a maximum of 120. Costs no runes to use.', '24617': 'Feint: Deal an attack which treats your target's defence as if it was reduced by 75%. It will deal a minimum of 20% extra damage.', '24699': 'Retainer: Traps a vampyre juvenile or juvinate provided they have 50% or less hitpoints remaining.', '25110': 'Lumber Up: Increase your Woodcutting level by 3.', '25112': 'Rock Knocker: Increase your Mining level by 3.', '25114': 'Fishstabber: Increase your Fishing level by 3.', '25517': 'Immolate: Fire a powerful spell with 50% improved accuracy. Costs no runes to use.', '26219': 'Eviscerate: Perform an attack with your true maximum hit and a 50% accuracy bonus.', '26233': 'Blood Sacrifice: Deal an attack that inflicts 10% more damage with double accuracy and marks your target for a blood sacrifice. Targets marked for a blood sacrifice will be hit for 25 damage after a short delay, unless they move away. If they are hit, you'll also be healed for the damage dealt. (Heal is capped at 15 in PvP)', '26374': 'Evoke: Perform an attack with double accuracy, with a guaranteed enchanted bolt activation rate on successful hit.', '26482': 'Energy Drain: Deal an attack with 25% increased accuracy that siphons 10% of your target's run energy.', '26484': 'Binding Tentacle: Bind your target for 5 seconds and increase the chance of them being poisoned.', '26708': 'Slice and Dice: Hit 4 times in quick succession, with great accuracy.', '26710': 'Smash: Deal an attack that inflicts 50% more damage and lowers your target's Defence level by 30%.', '26712': 'Concentrated Shot: Deal an attack with 25% increased accuracy and damage, but takes an additional 2.4 seconds to fire.', '27100': 'Pulverize: A crushing blow with 25% bonus accuracy that will reduce your target's defence by 35%.', '27157': 'Duality: Throws two knives at your opponent.', '27184': 'Blood Sacrifice: Deal an attack that inflicts 10% more damage with double accuracy and marks your target for a blood sacrifice. Targets marked for a blood sacrifice will be hit for 25 damage after a short delay, unless they move away. If they are hit, you'll also be healed for the damage dealt. (Heal is capped at 15 in PvP)', '27186': 'Evoke: Perform an attack with double accuracy, with a guaranteed enchanted bolt activation rate on successful hit.', '27188': 'Concentrated Shot: Deal an attack with 25% increased accuracy and damage, but takes an additional 2.4 seconds to fire.', '27246': 'Eviscerate: Perform an attack with your true maximum hit and a 50% accuracy bonus.', '27287': 'Wrath of Amascut: Perform an attack with 100% increased accuracy and 25% increased damage, but with halved attack speed. If hit, the opponent will take 25% increased damage for the next 6 seconds. This special attack can only be used within the Tombs of Amascut.', '27291': 'Tumeken's Light: Sacrifice 50 prayer points to restore your hitpoints to 20% above their maximum, cure all poison, restore all drained stats (except prayer) and fully restore your run energy. This special attack can only be used within the Tombs of Amascut.', '27655': 'Swarm: Fire 4 times in quick succession, dealing reduced damage and inflicting poison.', '27660': 'Bear Down: Perform an attack with double accuracy, dealing additional damage over time, draining your target's agility level and preventing them from running.', '27665': 'Condemn: Fire a powerful spell with increased accuracy and damage, lowering your target's magic and defence levels by up to 15%.', '27679': 'Condemn: Fire a powerful spell with increased accuracy and damage, lowering your target's magic and defence levels by up to 15%.', '27690': 'Disrupt: Summon a powerful bolt of lightning that deals guaranteed magic damage based on your max hit.', '27810': 'Celebrate: Perform an attack to leave the area feeling more festive.', '27853': 'Descent of Darkness: Deal a double attack that inflicts up to 30% more damage (minimum damage of 7 per hit).', '27855': 'Sunder: Deal an attack with double accuracy and 25% higher max hit. Lowers your target's Attack, Defence, Ranged or Magic level by 10% of the damage dealt.', '27857': 'Shatter: Increase damage by 50% and accuracy by 25% for one hit, treats your target's defence as if it was reduced to 60%.', '27859': 'Cleave: Deal a powerful attack that inflicts 25% more damage with 25% increased accuracy and increased speed.', '27861': 'Abyssal Puncture: Deal an attack that hits twice with 25% increased accuracy, but inflicts 5% less damage per hit. The second hit is guaranteed if the first deals damage.', '27863': 'Abyssal Puncture: Deal an attack that hits twice with 25% increased accuracy, but inflicts 5% less damage per hit. The second hit is guaranteed if the first deals damage.', '27865': 'Abyssal Puncture: Deal an attack that hits twice with 25% increased accuracy, but inflicts 5% less damage per hit. The second hit is guaranteed if the first deals damage.', '27867': 'Abyssal Puncture: Deal an attack that hits twice with 25% increased accuracy, but inflicts 5% less damage per hit. The second hit is guaranteed if the first deals damage.', '27869': 'Disrupt: Summon a powerful bolt of lightning that deals guaranteed magic damage based on your max hit.', '27900': 'Spear Wall: Will hit twice with second hit deals a damage between 25% - 75% of the first hit damage. After using this attack, you will be immune from melee attacks for 5 seconds.', '27904': 'Feint: Deal an attack which treats your target's defence as if it was reduced by 75%. It will deal a minimum of 20% extra damage.', '27908': 'Smash: Deal an attack which deals a minimum of 25% extra damage and lowers your target's Defence level by 30%.', '27912': 'Hamstring: Deal a minimum of 20% extra damage and hamstring player targets, causing them to lose run energy 6x faster for 1 minute.', '27916': 'Phantom Strike: This does nothing vs non-player targets. This special attack requires the full Frostmoon set to be worn.', '28997': 'Blood infusion: Sacrifice 25% of your current hp to deal an attack with 25% increased accuracy and damage, with a guaranteed set effect activation on hit. This special attack requires the full Bloodrager set to be worn.', '29000': 'Eclipse: Attack with 50% increased accuracy, consuming all remaining burn damage affecting the target and raising the max hit by that amount. This special attack requires the full Eclipse set to be worn.', '29577': 'Burning barrage: Attacks 3 times in quick succession, with a chance to burn the enemy on each hit.', '29589': 'Weaken: Temporarily drain your target's Attack, Strength and Defence by 5%. Is three times as effective against demons.', '29591': 'Scorching shackles: A scorching shot with 30% bonus accuracy that will bind and burn enemy demons for 12 seconds.)', '29594': 'Scatter ashes: Casts the highest available demonbane spell. If it kills a demon, it refunds its special attack energy cost, and reduces the next attack delay.', '29599': 'Descent of Darkness: Deal a double attack that inflicts up to 30% more damage (minimum damage of 5 per hit).', '29602': 'Immolate: Fire a powerful spell with 50% improved accuracy. (Heal is capped at 15 in PvP)', '26374': 'Evoke: Perform an attack with double accuracy, with a guaranteed enchanted bolt activation rate on successful hit.', '26482': 'Energy Drain: Deal an attack with 25% increased accuracy that siphons 10% of your target's run energy.', '26484': 'Binding Tentacle: Bind your target for 5 seconds and increase the chance of them being poisoned.', '26708': 'Slice and Dice: Hit 4 times in quick succession, with great accuracy.', '26710': 'Smash: Deal an attack that inflicts 50% more damage and lowers your target's Defence level by 30%.', '26712': 'Concentrated Shot: Deal an attack with 25% increased accuracy and damage, but takes an additional 2.4 seconds to fire.', '27100': 'Pulverize: A crushing blow with 25% bonus accuracy that will reduce your target's defence by 35%.', '27157': 'Duality: Throws two knives at your opponent.', '27184': 'Blood Sacrifice: Deal an attack that inflicts 10% more damage with double accuracy and marks your target for a blood sacrifice. (Heal is capped at 15 in PvP)', '27186': 'Evoke: Perform an attack with double accuracy, with a guaranteed enchanted bolt activation rate on successful hit.', '27188': 'Concentrated Shot: Deal an attack with 25% increased accuracy and damage, but takes an additional 2.4 seconds to fire.', '27246': 'Eviscerate: Perform an attack with your true maximum hit and a 50% accuracy bonus.', '27287': 'Wrath of Amascut: Perform an attack with 100% increased accuracy and 25% increased damage, but with halved attack speed. If hit, the opponent will take 25% increased damage for the next 6 seconds. This special attack can only be used within the Tombs of Amascut.', '27291': 'Tumeken's Light: Sacrifice 50 prayer points to restore your hitpoints to 20% above their maximum, cure all poison, restore all drained stats (except prayer) and fully restore your run energy. This attack deals no damage.', '28047': 'Shove: Push your target back and stun them for 3 seconds. This attack deals no damage.', '28049': 'Sweep: If your target is small, adjacent targets may be hit too. Otherwise, your target may be hit a second time, with 25% decreased accuracy. Damage in all cases is increased by 10% of your max hit.', '28051': 'Powerstab: Hit up to fourteen enemies surrounding you.', '28053': 'Annihilate: Hit your target with 20% extra damage and in multicombat zones, hit all adjacent targets by 20% less damage.', '28217': 'Lumber Up: Increase your Woodcutting level by 3.', '28220': 'Lumber Up: Increase your Woodcutting level by 3.', '28223': 'Lumber Up: Increase your Woodcutting level by 3.', '28226': 'Lumber Up: Increase your Woodcutting level by 3.', '28338': 'Behead: Consume all Soul Stacks, attacking with increased damage and accuracy per stack, and healing for 8 health per stack.', '28531': 'Disrupt: Summon a powerful bolt of lightning that deals guaranteed magic damage based on your max hit.', '28534': 'Slice and Dice: Hit 4 times in quick succession, with great accuracy.', '28537': 'The Judgement: Deal an attack that inflicts 37.5% more damage with double accuracy.', '28682': 'Shield Bash: Hit surrounding targets within a 10x10 area with 20% increased accuracy.', '28688': 'Toxic Siphon: Deal an attack with 100% increased accuracy that inflicts 50% more damage and heals you for 50% of the damage dealt.', '28919': 'Division: Fire a powerful piercing blade that reduces the targets Defence by 10% of their Magic Level.', '28922': 'Division: Fire a powerful piercing blade that reduces the targets Defence by 10% of their Magic Level.', '28988': 'Break Shackles: Attack with increased accuracy and damage based on the duration of any binding spells affecting them and ending said effect. This special attack requires the full Frostmoon set to be worn.', '28997': 'Blood infusion: Sacrifice 25% of your current hp to deal an attack with 25% increased accuracy and damage, with a guaranteed set effect activation on hit. This special attack requires the full Bloodrager set to be worn.', '29000': 'Eclipse: Attack with 50% increased accuracy, consuming all remaining burn damage affecting the target and raising the max hit by that amount. This special attack requires the full Eclipse set to be worn.', '29577': 'Burning barrage: Attacks 3 times in quick succession, with a chance to burn the enemy on each hit.', '29589': 'Weaken: Temporarily drain your target's Attack, Strength and Defence by 5%. Is three times as effective against demons.', '29591': 'Scorching shackles: A scorching shot with 30% bonus accuracy that will bind and burn enemy demons for 12 seconds.)', '29594': 'Scatter ashes: Casts the highest available demonbane spell. If it kills a demon, it refunds its special attack energy cost, and reduces the next attack delay.', '29599': 'Descent of Darkness: Deal a double attack that inflicts up to 30% more damage (minimum damage of 5 per hit).', '29602': 'Immolate: Fire a powerful spell with 50% improved accuracy. Damage scales based upon magic level and can be increased with magic damage boosting equipment. Costs no runes to use.', '29605': 'The Judgement: Deal an attack that inflicts 37.5% more damage with double accuracy.', '29607': 'Disrupt: Summon a powerful bolt of lightning that deals guaranteed magic damage based on your max hit.', '29609': 'Immolate: Fire a powerful spell with 50% improved accuracy. Damage scales based upon magic level and can be increased with magic damage boosting equipment. Costs no runes to use.', '29611': 'Descent of Darkness: Deal a double attack that inflicts up to 30% more damage (minimum damage of 5 per hit).', '29796': 'Virulence: Instantly metabolize any poison you are suffering from to buff your next attack by that amount of damage.', '29849': 'Break Shackles: Attack with increased accuracy and damage based on the duration of any binding spells affecting them and ending said effect. This special attack requires the full Frostmoon set to be worn.', '29850': 'Blood infusion: Sacrifice 25% of your current hp to deal an attack with 25% increased accuracy and damage, with a guaranteed set effect activation on hit. This special attack requires the full Bloodrager set to be worn.', '29851': 'Eclipse: Attack with 50% increased accuracy, consuming all remaining burn damage affecting the target and raising the max hit by that amount. This special attack requires the full Eclipse set to be worn.', '30305': 'Weaken: Temporarily drain your target's Attack, Strength and Defence by 5%. Is twice as effective against demons.', '30340': 'Crystalline Severance: Launch a powerful attack the pierces the Crystalline Hunllef's prayers and disables them briefly.', '30367': 'Echo slash: Launch an attack that applies each of the other godswords' effects.', '30369': 'Sol Slam: Immediately deal an AoE attack around you in a 7x7 radius, increases damage based on your prayer bonus.', '30388': 'Lingering Lightning: Attack the target twice, if either attack hits spawn additional lightning wherever the npc was standing, dealing damage to targets around it.'}
1913(1)
map {'0': 25110, '1': 28220, '2': 23673, '3': 25066, '4': 13241, '5': 28223, '6': 23675, '7': 25371, '8': 13242, '9': 28226, '10': 20011, '11': 25378, '12': 28217, '13': 6739, '14': 28214, '15': 23279, '16': 1359, '17': 28211, '18': 1357, '19': 28208, '20': 1355, '21': 28205, '22': 1361, '23': 28202, '24': 1353, '25': 28199, '26': 1349, '27': 28196, '28': 1351} {'0': 25110, '1': 28220, '2': 23673, '3': 25066, '4': 30347, '5': 13241, '6': 28223, '7': 23675, '8': 25371, '9': 30348, '10': 13242, '11': 28226, '12': 20011, '13': 25378, '14': 30352, '15': 28217, '16': 6739, '17': 28214, '18': 23279, '19': 1359, '20': 28211, '21': 1357, '22': 28208, '23': 1355, '24': 28205, '25': 1361, '26': 28202, '27': 1353, '28': 28199, '29': 1349, '30': 28196, '31': 1351}
2629(1)
map {'1': 'surprisepopup_custom_event', '2': 'surprisepopup_open_store', '3': 'surprisepopup_open_store_membership', '4': 'surprisepopup_open_store_bonds', '5': 'surprisepopup_poll', '6': 'surprisepopup_bond_pouch', '7': 'surprisepopup_quest_list', '8': 'surprisepopup_world_map', '9': 'surprisepopup_quest_WGS', '10': 'surprisepopup_world_map_varlamore', '11': 'surprisepopup_quest_COA'} {'1': 'surprisepopup_custom_event', '2': 'surprisepopup_open_store', '3': 'surprisepopup_open_store_membership', '4': 'surprisepopup_open_store_bonds', '5': 'surprisepopup_poll', '6': 'surprisepopup_bond_pouch', '7': 'surprisepopup_quest_list', '8': 'surprisepopup_world_map', '9': 'surprisepopup_quest_WGS', '10': 'surprisepopup_world_map_varlamore', '11': 'surprisepopup_quest_COA', '12': 'surprisepopup_worldswitcher'}

map {'1': 723, '2': 1721, '3': 3771, '4': 4699} {'1': 723, '2': 1721, '3': 3771, '4': 4699, '5': 6211}
2671(1)
map {'1': 10, '2': 40, '3': 80, '4': 200, '5': 400} {'1': 10, '2': 30, '3': 80, '4': 200, '5': 400}
2728(1)
map Complete tasks to earn League Points that can be used to unlock powerful Relics which enhance your gameplay!|Each League is different - figure out the best strategy to pull ahead of the competition. Or alternatively, just have fun!', '1': 'In Leagues, League Points can be earned by completing various tasks. These can then be used to unlock powerful Relics.|League Points are also transferred to your main game profile where they can be used to buy rewards in the Leagues Reward Shop.', '2': 'Relics are powerful buffs which affect your gameplay for the entire League. Choose carefully, because choices cannot be changed later!', '3': 'Your performance in the League is measured by how many League Points you earn. And the more you score compared to your rivals, the higher League Rank you'll achieve!|The cut-offs for League Ranks are: |- Bronze: 2500 points
- Iron: 5000 points
- Steel: 10, 000 points
- Mithril: 18, 000 points
- Adamant: 28, 000 points
- Rune: 42, 000 points
- Dragon: 56, 000 points', '4': 'As well as letting you unlock Relics, League Points are transferred to your main game profile.|Points can be used to buy rewards in the Leagues Reward Shop.|Performance in one League will also contribute to the next, with rewards such as: |- League Starter Outfits
- League Icons
- Pet Transfers'}		 Complete tasks to earn League Points that can be used to unlock powerful Relics which enhance your gameplay!|Each League is different - figure out the best strategy to pull ahead of the competition. Or alternatively, just have fun!', '1': 'In Leagues, League Points can be earned by completing various tasks. These can then be used to unlock powerful Relics.|League Points are also transferred to your main game profile where they can be used to buy rewards in the Leagues Reward Shop.', '2': 'Relics are powerful buffs which affect your gameplay for the entire League. Choose carefully, because choices cannot be changed later!', '3': 'Your performance in the League is measured by how many League Points you earn. And the more you score compared to your rivals, the higher League Rank you'll achieve!', '4': 'As well as letting you unlock Relics, League Points are transferred to your main game profile.|Points can be used to buy rewards in the Leagues Reward Shop.|Performance in one League will also contribute to the next, with rewards such as: |- League Starter Outfits
- League Icons
- Pet Transfers'}
2778(1)
map {'0': 24384, '1': 24382, '2': 24380, '3': 24378, '4': 24376, '5': 24374, '6': 24372, '7': 25054, '8': 25052, '9': 25050, '10': 25048, '11': 25046, '12': 25044, '13': 25042, '14': 26503, '15': 26505, '16': 26507, '17': 26509, '18': 26511, '19': 26513, '20': 26515, '21': 28763, '22': 28761, '23': 28759, '24': 28757, '25': 28755, '26': 28753, '27': 28751} {'0': 24384, '1': 24382, '2': 24380, '3': 24378, '4': 24376, '5': 24374, '6': 24372, '7': 25054, '8': 25052, '9': 25050, '10': 25048, '11': 25046, '12': 25044, '13': 25042, '14': 26503, '15': 26505, '16': 26507, '17': 26509, '18': 26511, '19': 26513, '20': 26515, '21': 28763, '22': 28761, '23': 28759, '24': 28757, '25': 28755, '26': 28753, '27': 28751, '28': 30477, '29': 30475, '30': 30473, '31': 30471, '32': 30469, '33': 30467, '34': 30465}
3047(1)
map {'0': , '1': '<col=ffffff>Ahrim The Blighted:

Blighted Aura:

Magic Attacks have a 25% chance of lowering the enemy's strength level by 5 on a successful hit.

', '2': '<col=ffffff>Dharok the Wretched:

Wretched Strength:

Attacks do more damage as your hitpoints decrease. For every hitpoint lost from your maximum hitpoints, you deal 1% more damage.

', '3': '<col=ffffff>Guthan the Infested:

Infestation:

Attacks have a 25% chance of replenishing your health equal to the damage you deal.

', '4': '<col=ffffff>Karil the Tainted:

Tainted Shot:

Successful range attacks have a 25% chance of lowering the enemy's agility stat by 20%.

', '5': '<col=ffffff>Torag the Corrupted:

Corruption:

Successful melee attacks have a 25% chance of lowering the victim's run energy by 20%.

', '6': '<col=ffffff>Verac the Defiled:

Defiler:

Attacks have a 25% chance of ignoring any armour, Defence, and protection prayers.

', '7': '<col=ffffff>Inquisitor's armour:

Each individual piece of Inquisitor's armour boosts damage and accuracy by 0.5% when using the crush attack style. This is boosted to 2.5% if an Inquisitor's mace is equipped.

If all pieces of the Inquisitor's armour are worn, a set bonus of 2.5% is applied.
Using the Inquisitor's mace will triple the overall set bonus to 7.5%.

', '8': '<col=ffffff>Graceful Outfit:

Each individual piece of the Graceful Outfit increases your run restoration rate.

Wearing the full Graceful Outfit increases run energy restoration by 30%.

', '9': '<col=ffffff>Obsidian armour:

All obsidian weaponry will be given a 10% boost in melee accuracy and melee strength.

', '10': '<col=ffffff>Void Knight Melee:

When wearing the Void Top, Robe, Gloves and Melee Helmet, you will receive +10% bonus to your melee damage and accuracy.

', '11': '<col=ffffff>Void Knight Range:

When wearing the Void Top, Robe, Gloves and Ranger Helmet, you will receive +10% bonus to your ranged damage and accuracy.

', '12': '<col=ffffff>Void Knight Elite Range:

When wearing the Elite Void Top, Elite Robe, Gloves and Ranger Helmet, you will receive +12.5% bonus to your ranged damage and 10% bonus to accuracy.

', '13': '<col=ffffff>Void Knight Mage:

When wearing the Void Top, Robe, Gloves and Mage Helmet, you will receive +45% bonus to your magic accuracy.

', '14': '<col=ffffff>Void Knight Elite Mage:

When wearing the Elite Void Top, Elite Robe, Gloves and Mage Helmet, you will receive a +45% bonus to your magic accuracy and 5% to your magic damage.

', '15': '<col=ffffff>Justiciar:

PvM damage dealt to you is reduced according to your total armour protection in that style.

', '16': '<col=ffffff>Angler outfit:

XP from training Fishing will be increased by 2.5% if the full set is worn. Incomplete sets give smaller bonuses.

', '17': '<col=ffffff>Lumberjack outfit:

XP from training Woodcutting will be increased by 2.5% if the full set is worn. Incomplete sets give smaller bonuses.

', '18': '<col=ffffff>Prospector outfit:

XP from training Mining will be increased by 2.5% if the full set is worn. Incomplete sets give smaller bonuses.

', '19': '<col=ffffff>Farmer outfit:

XP from training Farming will be increased by 2.5% if the full set is worn. Incomplete sets give smaller bonuses.

', '20': '<col=ffffff>Pyromancer outfit:

XP from training Firemaking will be increased by 2.5% if the full set is worn. Incomplete sets give smaller bonuses.

', '21': '<col=ffffff>Shayzien armour:

Reduces the damage of the acid splash attack used by Lizardman Shamans.

', '22': '<col=ffffff>Rogue kit:

The full set gives a 100% chance of double loot from standard pickpocketing. Incomplete sets give smaller chances.

', '23': '<col=ffffff>Carpenter's outfit:

XP from training Construction will be increased by 2.5% if the full set is worn. Incomplete sets give smaller bonuses.

', '24': '<col=ffffff>Crystal armour:

Each individual piece of Crystal Armour increases your accuracy and damage with crystal ranged weaponry.

Wearing the full set of Crystal Armour increases accuracy by 30% and damage by 15%.

', '25': '<col=ffffff>Swampbark Armour:

Wearing the helm, body, and legs increases the duration of Bind, Snare and Entangle spells by 3.6 seconds

', '26': '<col=ffffff>Bloodbark Armour:

The full set increases the amount healed by Blood spells to 35.0%.

', '27': '<col=ffffff>Zealot's prayer robes:

The full set grants a 5% chance of saving ensouled heads when reanimating them, bones when burying or offering them, and bonemeal & slime at the Ectofuntus. This stacks with the Wilderness altar's bone saving effect.

', '28': '<col=ffffff>Spirit Angler outfit:

XP from training Fishing will be increased by 2.5% if the full set is worn. Incomplete sets give smaller bonuses.

Full set acts as a tether rope when fighting Tempoross.

', '29': '<col=ffffff>Virtus Robes:

9% increased Magic damage with ancient spells.

Smoke spells reduce healing received by 30%, as long as the target is poisoned.

Shadow spells also drain Strength, Ranged, Magic and Defence, as well as Attack.

Blood spells can heal up to 20% over your maximum hitpoints.

Ice spells gain 10% additional accuracy against frozen targets.', '30': '<col=ffffff>Raiments of the Eye:

Runes crafted are increased by 60%.

This bonus stacks additively with other similar effects.

', '31': '<col=ffffff>Smith's Uniform:

The full set increases the rate you will smith items at an anvil by 1 tick.

', '32': '<col=ffffff>Statius's Equipment:

Melee special attacks have 15% increased accuracy.

', '33': '<col=ffffff>Vesta's Equipment:

Melee special attacks have 15% increased accuracy.

', '34': '<col=ffffff>Morrigan's Equipment:

Ranged special attacks have 15% increased accuracy.

', '35': '<col=ffffff>Zuriel's Equipment:

Magic special attacks have 15% increased accuracy.

', '36': '<col=ffffff>Statius's Corrupt Equipment:

Melee special attacks have 15% increased accuracy.

', '37': '<col=ffffff>Vesta's Corrupt Equipment:

Melee special attacks have 15% increased accuracy.

', '38': '<col=ffffff>Morrigan's Corrupt Equipment:

Ranged special attacks have 15% increased accuracy.

', '39': '<col=ffffff>Zuriel's Corrupt Equipment:

Magic special attacks have 15% increased accuracy.

', '40': '<col=ffffff>Bloodrager Effect:

Successful hits with the Dual Macuahuitl have a 33% chance of reducing the delay of your next attack by 1 tick.

The Dual Macuahuitl gains the 'Blood Infusion' special attack.

', '41': '<col=ffffff>Frostweaver Effect:

Casting spells which bind the enemy has a 50% chance to allow the next attack with the Blue moon spear to bypass the action delay.

The Blue Moon Spear gains the 'Break Shackles' special attack.

', '42': '<col=ffffff>Frostweaver Effect Set:

Casting spells which bind the enemy has a 20% chance to allow the next attack with the Blue moon spear to bypass the action delay.

The Blue Moon Spear gains the 'Break Shackles' special attack.

', '43': '<col=ffffff>Eclipse Effect:

Successful hits with the Eclipse Atlatl have a 20% chance to apply a burn effect to the enemy.

The Eclipse Atlatl gains the 'Eclipse' special attack.

', '44': '<col=ffffff>Hunter's Armour:

Damage taken from hunter creatures is reduced by 60%.

', '45': '<col=ffffff>Hunter's Armour:

Damage taken from hunter creatures is reduced by 40%.

', '46': '<col=ffffff>Hunter's Armour:

Damage taken from hunter creatures is reduced by 20%.

', '47': '<col=ffffff>Guild Hunter Outfit:

Increases catch chance of hunter creatures by up to 2.5%, and increases rare creature part droprate when doing Hunters' Rumours by up to 5%.

', '2001': '<col=ffffff>Ahrim The Blighted:

Blighted Aura +:

Magic Attacks have a 25% chance of lowering the enemy's strength level by 5 on a successful hit.

The spell also gets a 30% damage bonus.

', '2002': '<col=ffffff>Dharok the Wretched:

Wretched Strength +:

Attacks do more damage as your hitpoints decrease. For every hitpoint lost from your maximum hitpoints, you deal 1% more damage.

When you take damage, you have a 1/4 chance of reflecting 15% of the damage to your opponent.

', '2003': '<col=ffffff>Guthan the Infested:

Infestation +:

Attacks have a 25% chance of replenishing your health equal to the damage you deal.

This can boost your hitpoints by up to 10.

', '2004': '<col=ffffff>Karil the Tainted:

Tainted Shot +:

Successful range attacks have a 25% chance of lowering the enemy's agility stat by 20%.

A second hitplat is applied in PvP, dealing half the damage of the first.

', '2005': '<col=ffffff>Torag the Corrupted:

Corruption +:

Successful melee attacks have a 25% chance of lowering the victim's run energy by 20%.

For every hitpoint lost from your maximum hitpoints, your Defence stat gets an invisible boost.

', '2006': '<col=ffffff>Verac the Defiled:

Defiler +:

Attacks have a 25% chance of ignoring any armour, Defence, and protection prayers.

Gives a +7 prayer bonus.

'}		 {'0': , '1': '<col=ffffff>Ahrim The Blighted:

', '22': '<col=ffffff>Rogue kit:

The full set gives a 100% chance of double loot from standard pickpocketing. Incomplete sets give smaller chances.

', '23': '<col=ffffff>Carpenter's outfit:

', '26': '<col=ffffff>Bloodbark Armour:

', '40': '<col=ffffff>Bloodrager Effect:

', '1901': '<col=ffffff>Ahrim The Blighted:

Blighted Aura ++:

Magic Attacks have a 50% chance of lowering the enemy's strength level by 5 on a successful hit.

The spell also gets a 30% damage bonus.

', '1902': '<col=ffffff>Dharok the Wretched:

Wretched Strength ++:

Attacks do more damage as your hitpoints decrease. For every hitpoint lost from your maximum hitpoints, you deal 2% more damage.

When you take damage, you have a 2/4 chance of reflecting 15% of the damage to your opponent.

', '1903': '<col=ffffff>Guthan the Infested:

Infestation ++:

Attacks have a 50% chance of replenishing your health equal to the damage you deal.

This can boost your hitpoints by up to 10.

', '1904': '<col=ffffff>Karil the Tainted:

Tainted Shot ++:

Successful range attacks have a 50% chance of lowering the enemy's agility stat by 20%.

A second hitplat is applied in PvP, dealing half the damage of the first.

', '1905': '<col=ffffff>Torag the Corrupted:

Corruption ++:

Successful melee attacks have a 50% chance of lowering the victim's run energy by 20%.

For every hitpoint lost from your maximum hitpoints, your Defence stat gets an invisible boost.

', '1906': '<col=ffffff>Verac the Defiled:

Defiler ++:

Attacks have a 50% chance of ignoring any armour, Defence, and protection prayers.

Gives a +14 prayer bonus.

', '2001': '<col=ffffff>Ahrim The Blighted:

Blighted Aura +:

Magic Attacks have a 25% chance of lowering the enemy's strength level by 5 on a successful hit.

The spell also gets a 30% damage bonus.

', '2002': '<col=ffffff>Dharok the Wretched:

Wretched Strength +:

Attacks do more damage as your hitpoints decrease. For every hitpoint lost from your maximum hitpoints, you deal 1% more damage.

When you take damage, you have a 1/4 chance of reflecting 15% of the damage to your opponent.

', '2003': '<col=ffffff>Guthan the Infested:

Infestation +:

Attacks have a 25% chance of replenishing your health equal to the damage you deal.

This can boost your hitpoints by up to 10.

', '2004': '<col=ffffff>Karil the Tainted:

Tainted Shot +:

Successful range attacks have a 25% chance of lowering the enemy's agility stat by 20%.

A second hitplat is applied in PvP, dealing half the damage of the first.

', '2005': '<col=ffffff>Torag the Corrupted:

Corruption +:

Successful melee attacks have a 25% chance of lowering the victim's run energy by 20%.

For every hitpoint lost from your maximum hitpoints, your Defence stat gets an invisible boost.

', '2006': '<col=ffffff>Verac the Defiled:

Defiler +:

Attacks have a 25% chance of ignoring any armour, Defence, and protection prayers.

Gives a +7 prayer bonus.

'}
3372(1)
map Your character begins restricted to the areas of Misthalin and Karamja. As you complete tasks, you can unlock more areas.|Full information about each of the areas can be found in the Area Selection Menu. This can be accessed from the Leagues Menu in the Journal Panel.|All experience gained will be multiplied by 5x, and this will increase as you unlock more Relics.|Content released during Leagues IV will be reviewed and enabled for the League on a case-by-case basis.|Leagues IV: Trailblazer Reloaded will run from November 15th 2023 until the game update on January 10th 2024.', '1': 'Your character is an Ironman, meaning you cannot trade with other players.|As you begin with Misthalin and Karamja unlocked, the following quests have been auto-completed: |- Dragon Slayer
- Druidic Ritual
- Elemental Workshop I
- Bone Voyage
- Dig Site
- Fairytale II - Cure a Queen
- Fairytale I - Growing Pains
- Lost City
- Nature Spirit
- Priest in Peril
- The Restless Ghost
- Shilo Village
- Jungle Potion|You will start with the following stat increases: |- 3 Herblore
- 10 Agility
- 5 Runecraft|A Dramen Staff will be added to your Inventory so that you can access Zanaris. If lost, you can reclaim it from the Sage in Lumbridge.', '2': 'Slayer Masters will assign you the same tasks, taking into account the areas you have currently unlocked.|Teleports and transportation methods to locations outside of areas you have unlocked are restricted.|When purchasing your Player Owned House it will be accessible from Brimhaven. Your house can only be moved to areas you have unlocked.|Unlocking new areas will complete various quests and Achievement Diary tasks but will not award any quest completion XP. However, you may complete some quests on your own to gain their XP before unlocking the area which auto-completes it.|Some bosses will have the option to be fought in private areas without other players.|Some shop items will have infinite stock and let you buy items already noted.|The following shop stocks have been modified: |- Pestle and Mortars and Box Traps have been added to the Lumbridge General Store
- Black Platelegs have been added to Horvik's Armour Shop
- Elemental Shields have been added to all Slayer Equipment shops|Thessalia in Varrock will offer additional makeover services.|Impling spawn rates have been increased.|Rarity of rare implings has been increased.|Dragon implings drop reduced Dragon Bones.|All Soulreaper Axe pieces will drop from every Desert Treasure 2 Boss.'}		 Your character begins restricted to the areas of Misthalin and Karamja. As you complete tasks, you can unlock more areas.|Full information about each of the areas can be found in the Area Selection Menu. This can be accessed from the Leagues Menu in the Journal Panel.|All experience gained will be multiplied by 5x, and this will increase as you unlock more Relics.|Content released during Leagues V will be reviewed and enabled for the League on a case-by-case basis.|Leagues V: Raging Echoes will run from November 27th 2024 until the game update on January 22nd 2025.', '1': 'Your character is an Ironman, meaning you cannot trade with other players.|As you begin with Misthalin and Karamja unlocked, the following quests have been auto-completed: |- Dragon Slayer
- Druidic Ritual
- Elemental Workshop I
- Bone Voyage
- Dig Site
- Fairytale II - Cure a Queen
- Fairytale I - Growing Pains
- Lost City
- Nature Spirit
- Priest in Peril
- The Restless Ghost
- Shilo Village
- Jungle Potion|You will start with the following stat increases: |- 3 Herblore
- 5 Runecraft|A Dramen Staff will be added to your Inventory so that you can access Zanaris. If lost, you can reclaim it from the Sage in Lumbridge.

Any pets obtained in the previous league can be freely reclaimed from the Sage or Probita. Pet transmogs you may of obtained in the previous league will also be auto unlocked at the start of the league, though these will both no longer count towards your collection log total counter on a league world.', '2': 'Slayer Masters will assign you the same tasks, taking into account the areas you have currently unlocked.|Teleports and transportation methods to locations outside of areas you have unlocked are restricted.|When purchasing your Player Owned House it will be accessible from Brimhaven. Your house can only be moved to areas you have unlocked.|Unlocking new areas will complete various quests and Achievement Diary tasks but will not award any quest completion XP. However, you may complete some quests on your own to gain their XP before unlocking the area which auto-completes it.|Some bosses will have the option to be fought in private areas without other players.|Some shop items will have infinite stock and let you buy items already noted.|The following shop stocks have been modified: |- Pestle and Mortars and Box Traps have been added to the Lumbridge General Store
- Black Platelegs have been added to Horvik's Armour Shop
- Elemental Shields have been added to all Slayer Equipment shops|Thessalia in Varrock will offer additional makeover services.|Impling spawn rates have been increased.|Rarity of rare implings has been increased.|Dragon implings drop reduced Dragon Bones.|All Soulreaper Axe pieces will drop from every Desert Treasure 2 Boss.'}
3379(1)
defaultValue Welcome to Leagues IV - Trailblazer Reloaded! Welcome to Leagues V - Raging Echoes!
map {'0': 'Welcome to Leagues IV - Trailblazer Reloaded!', '3': 'The Leagues Menu', '4': 'The Leagues Menu', '5': 'Tasks', '7': 'Areas', '9': 'Relics', '11': 'Finishing Up'} {'0': 'Welcome to Leagues V - Raging Echoes!', '3': 'The Leagues Menu', '4': 'The Leagues Menu', '5': 'Tasks', '7': 'Areas', '9': 'Relics', '11': 'Finishing Up'}
3380(1)
map {'0': '<col=ffffff>Leagues</col> are time-limited <col=ffffff>game modes</col> that give you new ways to experience the world of <col=ffffff>Gielinor</col>.

The aim of each <col=ffffff>League</col> is to complete <col=ffffff>tasks</col> and earn
<col=ffffff>League Points</col>. These <col=ffffff>points</col> can then be exchanged for various <col=ffffff>unlocks</col> and <col=ffffff>rewards</col>.

To begin your journey in <col=ffffff>Leagues IV</col>, use the
<col=ffffff>Get Started</col> button below. Otherwise, you can use the
<col=ffffff>Exit Leagues</col> button to quit.', '3': 'In <col=ffffff>Leagues IV</col>, progression is key. To help you keep track of it, you have the <col=ffffff>Leagues Menu</col>. This is an extra section to the <col=ffffff>Journal Panel</col> whilst on a <col=ffffff>Leagues World</col>.

Let's open the <col=ffffff>Leagues Menu</col> now. To do so, look for the flashing <col=ffffff>quest icon</col> on your screen.', '4': 'Now that you have your <col=ffffff>Journal Panel</col> open, you can open the <col=ffffff>Leagues Menu</col>. To do so, look for the flashing <col=ffffff>Leagues tab</col>.', '5': 'Congratulations, you've completed your first <col=ffffff>task</col> in
<col=ffffff>Leagues IV</col>!

Completing <col=ffffff>tasks</col> is the ticket to success in any <col=ffffff>League</col> as doing so earns you <col=ffffff>League Points</col>.

Let's take a look at the <col=ffffff>task list</col> now. To do so, look for the flashing <col=ffffff>tasks button</col> in the <col=ffffff>Leagues Menu</col>.', '7': 'In <col=ffffff>Leagues IV</col>, the world of <col=ffffff>Gielinor</col> is split up into different <col=ffffff>areas</col>. Most of these have been locked off, but you can unlock new ones by completing <col=ffffff>tasks</col>.

Now that you've completed your first <col=ffffff>task</col>, you can unlock a new <col=ffffff>area</col>! To do so, look for the flashing <col=ffffff>areas button</col> in the <col=ffffff>Leagues Menu</col>.', '9': 'Completing <col=ffffff>tasks</col> doesn't just give you access to new <col=ffffff>areas</col>. The <col=ffffff>League Points</col> you earn from completing them can be used to unlock powerful <col=ffffff>Relics</col>!

Let's take a look at these <col=ffffff>Relics</col> now. To do so, look for the flashing <col=ffffff>Relics button</col> in the <col=ffffff>Leagues Menu</col>.', '11': 'You are now ready to properly start your adventure in <col=ffffff>Leagues IV - Trailblazer Reloaded</col>!

If you need a recap on anything, you can use the <col=ffffff>info button</col> in the <col=ffffff>Leagues Menu</col> at any time. Alternatively, the
<col=ffffff>Sage</col> in <col=ffffff>Lumbridge</col> can provide you with some
useful guidance.

When you are ready to begin, just use the <col=ffffff>End Tutorial</col> button below to get started.'}		 {'0': '<col=ffffff>Leagues</col> are time-limited <col=ffffff>game modes</col> that give you new ways to experience the world of <col=ffffff>Gielinor</col>.

The aim of each <col=ffffff>League</col> is to complete <col=ffffff>tasks</col> and earn
<col=ffffff>League Points</col>. These <col=ffffff>points</col> can then be exchanged for various <col=ffffff>unlocks</col> and <col=ffffff>rewards</col>.

To begin your journey in <col=ffffff>Leagues V</col>, use the
<col=ffffff>Get Started</col> button below. Otherwise, you can use the
<col=ffffff>Exit Leagues</col> button to quit.', '3': 'In <col=ffffff>Leagues V</col>, progression is key. To help you keep track of it, you have the <col=ffffff>Leagues Menu</col>. This is an extra section to the <col=ffffff>Journal Panel</col> whilst on a <col=ffffff>Leagues World</col>.

Let's open the <col=ffffff>Leagues Menu</col> now. To do so, look for the flashing <col=ffffff>quest icon</col> on your screen.', '4': 'Now that you have your <col=ffffff>Journal Panel</col> open, you can open the <col=ffffff>Leagues Menu</col>. To do so, look for the flashing <col=ffffff>Leagues tab</col>.', '5': 'Congratulations, you've completed your first <col=ffffff>task</col> in
<col=ffffff>Leagues V</col>!

Completing <col=ffffff>tasks</col> is the ticket to success in any <col=ffffff>League</col> as doing so earns you <col=ffffff>League Points</col>.

Let's take a look at the <col=ffffff>task list</col> now. To do so, look for the flashing <col=ffffff>tasks button</col> in the <col=ffffff>Leagues Menu</col>.', '7': 'In <col=ffffff>Leagues V</col>, the world of <col=ffffff>Gielinor</col> is split up into different <col=ffffff>areas</col>. Most of these have been locked off, but you can unlock new ones by completing <col=ffffff>tasks</col>.

Now that you've completed your first <col=ffffff>task</col>, you can unlock a new <col=ffffff>area</col>! To do so, look for the flashing <col=ffffff>areas button</col> in the <col=ffffff>Leagues Menu</col>.', '9': 'Completing <col=ffffff>tasks</col> doesn't just give you access to new <col=ffffff>areas</col>. The <col=ffffff>League Points</col> you earn from completing them can be used to unlock powerful <col=ffffff>Relics</col>!

Let's take a look at these <col=ffffff>Relics</col> now. To do so, look for the flashing <col=ffffff>Relics button</col> in the <col=ffffff>Leagues Menu</col>.', '11': 'You are now ready to properly start your adventure in <col=ffffff>Leagues V - Raging Echoes</col>!

If you need a recap on anything, you can use the <col=ffffff>info button</col> in the <col=ffffff>Leagues Menu</col> at any time. Alternatively, the
<col=ffffff>Sage</col> in <col=ffffff>Lumbridge</col> can provide you with some
useful guidance.

When you are ready to begin, just use the <col=ffffff>End Tutorial</col> button below to get started.'}
3412(1)
map {'0': 'Global', '1': 'Misthalin', '2': 'Karamja', '3': 'Asgarnia', '4': 'Kandarin', '5': 'Morytania', '6': 'Kharidian Desert', '7': 'Tirannwn', '8': 'Fremennik Province', '10': 'Kourend & Kebos', '11': 'Wilderness', '23': 'Unlocked Areas'} {'0': 'Global', '1': 'Misthalin', '2': 'Karamja', '3': 'Asgarnia', '4': 'Kandarin', '5': 'Morytania', '6': 'Kharidian Desert', '7': 'Tirannwn', '8': 'Fremennik Province', '10': 'Kourend & Kebos', '11': 'Wilderness', '20': 'Kourend & Kebos', '21': 'Varlamore', '23': 'Unlocked Areas'}

map {'1': 1, '2': 1, '3': 1, '5': 1, '6': 1, '7': 1, '8': 1, '9': 1, '10': 1, '11': 1, '12': 1, '13': 1, '14': 1, '15': 1, '16': 1, '17': 1, '18': 1, '19': 1, '20': 1, '21': 1, '22': 1, '23': 1, '24': defaultValue null Unranked
5202(1)
map {'1': 28763, '2': 28761, '3': 28759, '4': 28757, '5': 28755, '6': 28753, '7': 28751} {'1': 30477, '2': 30475, '3': 30473, '4': 30471, '5': 30469, '6': 30467, '7': 30465}
5222(1)
map Your character begins restricted to the areas of Misthalin and Karamja. As you complete tasks, you can unlock more areas.|Full information about each of the areas can be found in the Area Selection Menu. This can be accessed from the Leagues Menu in the Journal Panel.|All experience gained will be multiplied by 5x, and this will increase as you unlock more Relics.|Content released during Leagues IV will be reviewed and enabled for the League on a case-by-case basis.|Leagues IV: Trailblazer Reloaded will run from November 16th 2023 until the game update on January 10th 2024.', '1': 'Your character is an Ironman, meaning you cannot trade with other players.|As you begin with Misthalin and Karamja unlocked, the following quests have been auto-completed: |- Dragon Slayer
- Druidic Ritual
- Elemental Workshop I
- Bone Voyage
- Dig Site
- Fairytale II - Cure a Queen
- Fairytale I - Growing Pains
- Lost City
- Nature Spirit
- Priest in Peril
- The Restless Ghost
- Shilo Village
- Jungle Potion|You will start with the following stat increases: |- 3 Herblore
- 10 Agility
- 5 Runecraft|A Dramen Staff will be added to your Inventory so that you can access Zanaris. If lost, you can reclaim it from the Sage in Lumbridge.', '2': 'Slayer Masters will assign you the same tasks, taking into account the areas you have currently unlocked.|Teleports and transportation methods to locations outside of areas you have unlocked are restricted.|When purchasing your Player Owned House it will be accessible from Brimhaven. Your house can only be moved to areas you have unlocked.|Unlocking new areas will complete various quests and Achievement Diary tasks but will not award any quest completion XP. However, you may complete some quests on your own to gain their XP before unlocking the area which auto-completes it.|Some bosses will have the option to be fought in private areas without other players.|Some shop items will have infinite stock and let you buy items already noted.|The following shop stocks have been modified: |- Pestle and Mortars and Box Traps have been added to the Lumbridge General Store
- Black Platelegs have been added to Horvik's Armour Shop
- Elemental Shields have been added to all Slayer Equipment shops|Thessalia in Varrock will offer additional makeover services.|Impling spawn rates have been increased.|Rarity of rare implings has been increased.|Dragon implings drop reduced Dragon Bones.|All Soulreaper Axe pieces will drop from every Desert Treasure 2 Boss.|Pets do not count towards the collection log tasks.'}		 Your character begins restricted to the areas of Misthalin and Karamja. As you complete tasks, you can unlock more areas.|Full information about each of the areas can be found in the Area Selection Menu. This can be accessed from the Leagues Menu in the Journal Panel.|All experience gained will be multiplied by 5x, and this will increase as you unlock more Relics.|Content released during Leagues V will be reviewed and enabled for the League on a case-by-case basis.|Leagues V: Raging Echoes will run from November 27th 2024 until the game update on January 22th 2025.', '1': 'Your character is an Ironman, meaning you cannot trade with other players.|As you begin with Misthalin and Karamja unlocked, the following quests have been auto-completed: |- Dragon Slayer
- Druidic Ritual
- Elemental Workshop I
- Bone Voyage
- Dig Site
- Fairytale II - Cure a Queen
- Fairytale I - Growing Pains
- Lost City
- Nature Spirit
- Priest in Peril
- The Restless Ghost
- Shilo Village
- Jungle Potion|You will start with the following stat increases: |- 3 Herblore
- 5 Runecraft|A Dramen Staff will be added to your Inventory so that you can access Zanaris. If lost, you can reclaim it from the Sage in Lumbridge.', '2': 'Slayer Masters will assign you the same tasks, taking into account the areas you have currently unlocked.|Teleports and transportation methods to locations outside of areas you have unlocked are restricted.|When purchasing your Player Owned House it will be accessible from Brimhaven. Your house can only be moved to areas you have unlocked.|Unlocking new areas will complete various quests and Achievement Diary tasks but will not award any quest completion XP. However, you may complete some quests on your own to gain their XP before unlocking the area which auto-completes it.|Some bosses will have the option to be fought in private areas without other players.|Some shop items will have infinite stock and let you buy items already noted.|The following shop stocks have been modified: |- Pestle and Mortars and Box Traps have been added to the Lumbridge General Store
- Black Platelegs have been added to Horvik's Armour Shop
- Elemental Shields have been added to all Slayer Equipment shops|Thessalia in Varrock will offer additional makeover services.|Impling spawn rates have been increased.|Rarity of rare implings has been increased.|Dragon implings drop reduced Dragon Bones.|All Soulreaper Axe pieces will drop from every Desert Treasure 2 Boss.|Pets do not count towards the collection log tasks.'}
5239(1)

id params
1108(1) {'743': 9, '744': 'Leagues', '745': 3661}
1109(1) {'1078': 5, '1086': 'Leagues', '1088': 'league, mastery, relic, relics'}
1110(1) {'1077': 127, '1078': 0, '1084': 1, '1085': 1, '1086': 'Display Relics', '1088': 'buff bar, leagues', '1096': 'When enabled, shows the relics you have unlocked and any associated buffs on the buff bar.', '1272': 1}
1111(1) {'1077': 418, '1078': 0, '1084': 1, '1085': 1, '1086': 'Display Combat Masteries', '1088': 'buff bar, leagues, mastery, masteries, combat', '1096': 'When enabled, shows your combat mastery paths on the buff bar.', '1272': 1, '1996': 1}
1112(1) {'1275': 123, '1276': 2147070, '1277': 1, '1279': 'Last Recall.', '1280': 524320, '1480': 1, '1482': 1, '1538': 0, '1997': 495, '1998': 1}
1113(1) {'1275': 124, '1276': 2147070, '1277': 1, '1279': 'Last Recall.', '1280': 524320, '1480': 1, '1482': 1, '1538': 0, '1997': 495, '1998': 1}
1114(1) {'1275': 125, '1276': 2147070, '1277': 1, '1279': 'Last Recall.', '1280': 524320, '1480': 1, '1482': 1, '1538': 0, '1997': 495, '1998': 1}
1115(1)
1116(1) {'879': 'Production Prodigy', '880': '- When doing the following activities, all items are processed at once:

- Smelting ores, Smithing bars (does not work with the Superheat item spell) and making Cannonballs.

- Fletching logs, stringing Bows and cutting bolt tips.

- Cleaning herbs and making Potions which do not have a stackable secondary ingredient.

- Cooking food and making Jugs of Wine.

- Crafting leather, uncut gems, glassblowing, jewellery, pottery, Battlestaves and spinning flax or wool.

- Full XP is given for items processed using this Relic.

- There is a 25% chance that you will make an extra product, which will be sent to your Bank if you have space. The additional product will also grant XP.

- Additionally Crafting, Smithing, Herblore, Fletching and Cooking are boosted by +12.', '881': 5310, '882': 5419, '883': 5337, '884': 5283, '885': 0, '1853': 5364, '1854': 5392}
1117(1) {'879': 'Power Miner', '880': '- This pickaxe will act as an non-degradable variant of the crystal equivalent with no requirements.

- When this item is in your inventory or equipped, you gain the following benefits:

- On failing to mine a rock, you will have a separate 50% chance to succeed.

- Items gathered from Mining are automatically sent to your Bank.

- The Echo Pickaxe will cause the rock to not deplete until you have mined 4 ore.

- This buff does stack with the existing Mining Gloves, with a cap of 7 ores from a given node.

You will be able to toggle the following effects on or off for the Pickaxe:

- Collected ores are automatically smelted and grant Smithing XP (regardless of your smithing level.)

- Gems gathered from Mining are automatically cut and grant Crafting XP regardless of your Crafting level.', '881': 5988, '882': 6097, '883': 6015, '884': 5961, '885': 0, '1853': 6042, '1854': 6070, '1855': 1, '2049': 25112}
1118(1) {'879': 'Animal Wrangler', '880': '- This harpoon will act as an non-degradable variant of the crystal equivalent with no requirements.

- When this item is in your inventory or equipped, you gain the following benefits:

- On failing to fish a spot, you will have a separate 50% chance to succeed.

- Items gathered from Fishing are automatically sent to your Bank.

- Fish caught have a 50% chance to be automatically cooked, granting Cooking experience regardless of level requirements.

- Attempt to catch fish 1 tick faster.

- It will also work for fish that don't require a harpoon to be caught, and your harpoon can be substituted as a Net, Big Net, Lobster Pot, or any Rod whilst Fishing.

Alongside the Echo harpoon effects you will get the following benefits to <col=ffffff>Hunter</col>:

- Hunter catching will never fail.

- Box traps catch chinchompas faster.

- Chinchompas are doubled when caught, also giving double XP.

- Impling jars no longer break upon opening them.

Lastly, you never burn food when Cooking.', '881': 5989, '882': 6098, '883': 6016, '884': 5962, '885': 0, '1853': 6043, '1854': 6071, '1855': 1, '2049': 25114}
1119(1) {'879': 'Lumberjack', '880': '- This axe will act as an non-degradable variant of the crystal equivalent with no requirements.

- When this item is in your inventory or equipped, you gain the following benefits:

- On failing to chop a tree, you will have a separate 50% chance to succeed.

- Items gathered from Woodcutting are automatically sent to your Bank.

You will be able to toggle the following effects on or off for the Axe:

- Automatically burning logs for Firemaking XP (regardless of your Firemaking level.)

- Automatically Fletching logs into arrowshafts for Fletching XP (regardless of your Fletching level.).

Additionally, you gain the following benefits to <col=ffffff>Firemaking</col>:

- Never fail to make fires with any logs at any Firemaking level.', '881': 5990, '882': 6099, '883': 6017, '884': 5963, '885': 0, '1853': 6044, '1854': 6072, '1855': 1, '2049': 25110}
1120(1) {'879': 'Clue Compass', '880': '- This item will allow you to <col=ffffff>Teleport</col> to any S.T.A.S.H unit and Falo the Bard (Respecting area unlocks).

- It has the ability to teleport you to your current clue step, if you have one. Note - this will not work on clue steps that require you to kill a certain NPC.

- This item ignores wilderness teleport restrictions.

- This item cannot be used to teleport to an area you haven't unlocked.', '881': 5993, '882': 6102, '883': 6020, '884': 5966, '885': 2, '1853': 6047, '1854': 6075, '1855': 1, '2049': 30363}
1121(1) {'879': 'Bank Heist', '880': '- This item will allow you to <col=ffffff>Teleport</col> to any deposit box, bank, or bank chest.

- This item ignores wilderness teleport restrictions.

- This item cannot be used to teleport to an area you haven't unlocked.', '881': 5992, '882': 6101, '883': 6019, '884': 5965, '885': 2, '1853': 6046, '1854': 6074, '1855': 1, '2049': 30361}
1123(1) {'879': 'Corner Cutter', '880': '- While equipped, Sage's Greaves will grant Agility XP based on your Agility level while you run.

- Completing an Agility course grants two completion count and 25% bonus XP.

- 100% success rate on all Thieving checks.

- Marks of Grace will also spawn with 10, 000 coins.

- Double Quantity of Pyramid Tops, Hallowed Marks and Agility Vouchers, and Crystal shards (From agility)', '881': 5994, '882': 6103, '883': 6021, '884': 5967, '885': 1, '1853': 6048, '1854': 6076, '1855': 1, '2049': 28771}
1124(1) {'879': 'Friendly Forager', '880': '- This item will provide the following benefits whilst in your inventory or equipped:

- When you gather resources from Woodcutting, Fishing, Mining and Hunting, the Forager's Pouch will find and store a random grimy herb, limited to herbs your herblore level + 25 can clean, whilst also providing a small amount of token XP when one is found.

- The Forager's Pouch will only find herbs it has room to store, but will always attempt to give you a herb you can receive.

- The Forager's Pouch works just like a Herb Sack, and shares an inventory with it.

Additionally, you gain the following benefits to <col=ffffff>Herblore</col> when crafting potions:

- Secondary ingredients have a 90% chance to not be consumed. This stacks additively with other sources.

- Created potions contain 4 doses instead of 3.', '881': 5995, '882': 6104, '883': 6022, '884': 5968, '885': 1, '1853': 6049, '1854': 6077, '1855': 1, '2049': 30357}
1125(1) {'879': 'Dodgy Deals', '880': 'You gain the following benefits to <col=ffffff>Thieving</col>:

- Pickpocketing an NPC will also pickpocket all NPCs of similar type in a 11x11 square, granting extra loot for each NPC pickpocketed.

- 100% success rate on all Thieving checks.

- Automatically re-pickpocket an NPC or stall until you can no longer do so.

- Items obtained from pickpocketing are noted.

- Maximum coin pouch count increased by 3x.

- Stalls do not deplete when you steal from them.', '881': 5996, '882': 6105, '883': 6023, '884': 5969, '885': 1, '1853': 6050, '1854': 6078, '1855': 0}
1126(1) {'879': 'Pocket Kingdom', '880': '- This item allows full access to the Managing Miscellania feature from anywhere.

- Workers will work for 50% less coins, always have max appeal, produce twice as many resources, and accrue resources every hour instead of every day.', '881': 5997, '882': 6106, '883': 6024, '884': 5970, '885': 6, '1853': 6051, '1854': 6079, '1855': 1, '2049': 30365}
1127(1) {'879': 'Reloaded', '880': 'Choose another Relic from any tier below this one.', '881': 5998, '882': 6107, '883': 6025, '884': 5971, '885': 3, '1853': 6052, '1854': 6080, '1855': 0, '2047': 1}
1128(1) {'879': 'Treasure Arbiter', '880': 'You gain the following benefits when <col=ffffff>Clue Hunting</col>:

- Sources of clues are now a 1/15 chance.

- Clue Geodes, Clue Nests and Clue Bottles are found 10x more often.

- All Clue Scrolls have the lowest number of steps possible for their tier.

- Emote, Falo and Charlie Clue steps no longer have item requirements.

- Every Clue Scroll casket will roll the max amount of rewards it can give. It can roll the same item more than once. :
- Beginner caskets will roll 3 times.
- Easy caskets will roll 4 times.
- Medium caskets will roll 5 times.
- Hard caskets will roll 6 times.
- Elite caskets will roll 6 times.
- Master caskets will roll 7 times.', '881': 6000, '882': 6109, '883': 6027, '884': 5973, '885': 4, '1853': 6054, '1854': 6082, '1855': 0}
1129(1) {'879': 'Slayer Master', '880': 'You gain the following benefits to <col=ffffff>Slayer</col>:

- Always on task for all eligible slayer monsters.

- Unlock all Slayer Task perks for free.

- Rune Pouches, Herb Sacks and Looting Bags in the Slayer Point store are all free.

- Skip and block Tasks for free.

- Gain 1000-15, 000 bonus Slayer XP for the first time you kill the 100th of each unique Slayer monster, scaled by the monster's Slayer level requirement (XP stated is before multipliers).', '881': 6002, '882': 6111, '883': 6029, '884': 5975, '885': 4, '1853': 6056, '1854': 6084, '1855': 0}
1130(1) {'879': 'Total Recall', '880': '- This item can be used to store any single coordinate, alongside your Hitpoints, Prayer and Special Attack Energy, and teleport back to it at a later date, restoring those stats to what they were.

- This item ignores wilderness teleport restrictions.

- The Crystal of Echoes cannot store coordinates whilst inside an instance.

- There are various other locations this item won't store coordinates in, including quest areas, certain minigames, etc.', '881': 6003, '882': 6112, '883': 6030, '884': 5976, '885': 5, '1853': 6057, '1854': 6085, '1855': 1, '2049': 25104}
1131(1) {'879': 'Golden God', '880': 'You gain the following benefits to the <col=ffffff>High and Low Alchemy spells</col>:

- The spells have no rune cost or level requirement.

- Items give 15% more gold, and have a 65% chance to not be consumed.

- When cast on a stack of items, the spells will automatically be recast over time, until the stack is depleted or moved.

You gain the following benefits to <col=ffffff>Prayer</col>:

- 20, 000 Coins can be offered at Prayer altars in exchange for Prayer XP equivalent to using a dragon bone. This respects altar XP modifiers. Normal altars have no modifiers.

- All items purchased from some select shops can be noted, provided the item can be noted at all.
- There will be a new button on select shops which toggles this effect.', '881': 6005, '882': 6114, '883': 6032, '884': 5978, '885': 3, '1853': 6059, '1854': 6087, '1855': 0}
1132(1) {'879': 'Grimoire', '880': '- This item can be used to freely swap between spellbooks.

- The Grimoire acts as a Book of the Dead.

Additionally, when you select this relic, you will unlock access to all Prayers and spells, regardless of area, quest, or diary requirements.', '881': 6006, '882': 6115, '883': 6033, '884': 5979, '885': 6, '1853': 6060, '1854': 6088, '1855': 1, '2049': 26551}
1133(1) {'879': 'Overgrown', '880': '- This item can be used to access the Seed Vault from anywhere in the world.

Additionally, you gain the following benefits to <col=ffffff>Farming</col>:

- Crops never die.

- When planting a seed, it has a 75% chance to not be consumed.

- When a seed fully grows, if your Seed Vault has another seed of the same type it will harvest the patch for you, then replant the seed. (Only works whilst online)', '881': 6007, '882': 6116, '883': 6034, '884': 5980, '885': 6, '1853': 6061, '1854': 6089, '1855': 1, '2049': 30359}
1134(1) {'879': 'Specialist', '880': 'You gain the following benefits to <col=ffffff>special attacks</col>:

- All special attacks cost 20% and have +100% accuracy.

- For each failed accuracy roll with a special attack, gain 10% Special Attack Energy.

- Whenever you kill an NPC, restore 15% Special Attack Energy.', '881': 6008, '882': 6117, '883': 6035, '884': 5981, '885': 7, '1853': 6062, '1854': 6090, '1855': 0}
1135(1) {'879': 'Last Stand', '880': 'You gain the <col=ffffff>Last Stand</col> ability, which works as follows:

- If damage would reduce you to 0 hp, you are reduced to 1 hp instead.

- Your combat stats are instantly boosted to 255 but begin draining rapidly back down to their base level + 15.

- For the next 16 ticks after this ability is activated, you cannot be reduced to 0 HP.

- When the effect ends, all incoming damage is nullified and the player is healed based on the damage they dealt over the last 16 ticks.

Once this ability is used, it cannot be used again until you die or 3 minutes have passed.', '881': 6010, '882': 6119, '883': 6037, '884': 5983, '885': 7, '1853': 6064, '1854': 6092, '1855': 0}
1136(1) {'877': 0, '878': 5703, '2045': 1144}
1137(1) {'877': 750, '878': 5704, '2045': 1145}
1138(1) {'877': 1500, '878': 5705, '2045': 1146}
1139(1) {'877': 2500, '878': 5706, '2045': 1148}
1140(1) {'877': 5000, '878': 5707, '2045': 1149}
1141(1) {'877': 8000, '878': 5708, '2045': 1150}
1142(1) {'877': 16000, '878': 5709, '2045': 1151}
1143(1) {'877': 25000, '878': 5710, '2045': 1152}
1144(1) {'1020': '- League XP multiplier is 5x.

- Items from eligible sources will be 2x as common.

- Farming ticks will occur every minute instead of every five minutes.

- Minigame points received are boosted by 4x.

- Run energy is never drained whilst running.

- All clue scrolls will drop as stackable scroll boxes, and clue-step progress is saved between clues.'}
1145(1) {'1020': '- League XP multiplier increased from 5x to 8x.'}
1146(1) {'1020': '- Combat skills (Including Hitpoints & Prayer) have a 2x Multiplier (Multiplicative with other modifiers).
- The \'Bigger and badder\' slayer unlock is unlocked for free.
- Slayer points are x5 from tasks and you aren't required to complete 5 tasks before earning points.
- Slayer Superior rates are increased to a 1/50 chance to appear.
'}
1148(1) {'1020': '- Items from eligible sources will be 5x as common.
- Minigame points received are boosted by 8x.'}
1149(1) {'1020': '- League XP multiplier increased from 8x to 12x.'}
1150(1) {'1020': 'There are no passive unlocks for this tier.'}
1151(1) {'1020': '- League XP multiplier increased from 12x to 16x.'}
1152(1) {'1020': 'There are no passive unlocks for this tier.'}
1153(1) {'2026': 'Charge Reduction', '2028': '95% chance to save weapon charges, ammunition, and runes used for spells.'}
1154(1) {'2026': 'Healing', '2028': 'Healing from all sources is increased by 20%.'}
1155(1) {'2026': 'Damage Reduction', '2028': 'Damage taken is reduced by 15%.'}
1156(1) {'2026': 'Accuracy', '2028': 'Accuracy with all styles is increased by 100%.'}
1157(1) {'2026': 'Prayer Point Gain', '2028': 'Prayer Point gain from all sources is increased by 25%.'}
1158(1) {'2026': 'Prayer Penetration', '2028': 'Attacks with all styles now have 60% Prayer penetration.'}
1159(1) {'2026': 'Magic I', '2027': 5, '2028': 'When you roll above 90% of your max hit with <col=0xffffff>Magic</col>, damage is increased by 50%.', '2031': 6211, '2032': 6229, '2033': 6175, '2034': 6193, '2035': 6139, '2036': 6253}
1160(1) {'2026': 'Magic II', '2027': 5, '2028': '<col=0xffffff>Magic</col> max hit is increased by 5% per tick in-between your attacks (Up to +40%).', '2031': 6212, '2032': 6230, '2033': 6176, '2034': 6194, '2035': 6140, '2036': 6254}
1161(1) {'2026': 'Magic III', '2027': 5, '2028': '<col=0xffffff>Magic</col> attack rate set to 80%, rounding down.', '2031': 6213, '2032': 6231, '2033': 6177, '2034': 6195, '2035': 6141, '2036': 6255}
1162(1) {'2026': 'Magic IV', '2027': 5, '2028': 'When you roll above 90% of your max hit with <col=0xffffff>Magic</col>, heal 10% of damage dealt.', '2031': 6214, '2032': 6232, '2033': 6178, '2034': 6196, '2035': 6142, '2036': 6256}
1163(1) {'2026': 'Magic V', '2027': 5, '2028': '<col=0xffffff>Magic</col> attack rate set to 50%, rounded down above 5t, rounded up below 4t.', '2031': 6215, '2032': 6233, '2033': 6179, '2034': 6197, '2035': 6143, '2036': 6257}
1164(1) {'2026': 'Magic VI', '2027': 5, '2028': 'Max hit with <col=0xffffff>Magic</col> is increased by 1% for every 100 Hitpoints remaining on target (Up to 10%)
On a successful <col=0xffffff>Magic</col> hit, If your target has less health than your max hit, you max hit.', '2031': 6216, '2032': 6234, '2033': 6180, '2034': 6198, '2035': 6144, '2036': 6258}
1165(1) {'2026': 'Melee I', '2027': 3, '2028': '<col=0xffffff>Melee</col> hits have a 25% chance to roll damage twice and take the highest result.', '2031': 6199, '2032': 6217, '2033': 6163, '2034': 6181, '2035': 6127, '2036': 6241}
1166(1) {'2026': 'Melee II', '2027': 3, '2028': '<col=0xffffff>Melee</col> hits have a 10% chance to generate an echo hit.
(Additional melee hit, 50% max-hit, respects Accuracy, PvM only)', '2031': 6200, '2032': 6218, '2033': 6164, '2034': 6182, '2035': 6128, '2036': 6242}
1167(1) {'2026': 'Melee III', '2027': 3, '2028': '<col=0xffffff>Melee</col> attack rate set to 80%, rounding down.', '2031': 6201, '2032': 6219, '2033': 6165, '2034': 6183, '2035': 6129, '2036': 6243}
1168(1) {'2026': 'Melee IV', '2027': 3, '2028': '<col=0xffffff>Melee</col> hits have a 5% chance to heal 40% of damage dealt.', '2031': 6202, '2032': 6220, '2033': 6166, '2034': 6184, '2035': 6130, '2036': 6244}
1169(1) {'2026': 'Melee V', '2027': 3, '2028': '<col=0xffffff>Melee</col> attack rate set to 50%, rounded down above 5t, rounded up below 4t.', '2031': 6203, '2032': 6221, '2033': 6167, '2034': 6185, '2035': 6131, '2036': 6245}
1170(1) {'2026': 'Melee VI', '2027': 3, '2028': 'Your chance to generate an echo increases to 20%, and your echoes can generate additional echoes (Up to 8 times in a row).', '2031': 6204, '2032': 6222, '2033': 6168, '2034': 6186, '2035': 6132, '2036': 6246}
1171(1) {'2026': 'Ranged I', '2027': 4, '2028': 'Damage rolls beneath 30% of max hit with <col=0xffffff>Ranged</col> are increased to 30%.', '2031': 6205, '2032': 6223, '2033': 6169, '2034': 6187, '2035': 6133, '2036': 6247}
1172(1) {'2026': 'Ranged II', '2027': 4, '2028': 'Each subsequent <col=0xffffff>Ranged</col> attack has its max hit increased by an additional 5%. Resets after +20%.', '2031': 6206, '2032': 6224, '2033': 6170, '2034': 6188, '2035': 6134, '2036': 6248}
