5976(1) {'2020': 'The Misthalin area covers the entire Kingdom of Misthalin along with Fossil Island, Zanaris and the Abyss.

Instances of areas in Misthalin and underground areas with an entrance in Misthalin will also be included.

Access to Al Kharid, Port Sarim and the western exit of Barbarian Village is blocked by magical barriers.

All transportation and teleportation through Charter Ships, Customs Officers, Gnome Gliders, Fairy Rings, Balloons, or any other transport system will require you to have unlocked access to the area your destination is in.

The following travel options are restricted unless you have access to the appropriate area:

- The gate between Lumbridge and Al Kharid
- The entrance to the Kalphite Hive from Dorgesh-Kaan Dungeon
- The grapple shortcut between Lumbridge and Al Kharid
- The stepping stone between Lumbridge Swamp and the Kalphite Lair
- The under-wall shortcut between Draynor Village and Port Sarim
- The underground sections of the Paterdomus Temple
- The railing shortcut between the Paterdomus Temple and Canifis

', '2021': 'Notable Settlements:

- Barbarian Village
- Draynor Village
- Edgeville
- Fossil Island
- Lumbridge
- The Digsite
- Varrock
- Zanaris
- Isle of Souls and Soul Wars
- Dorgesh-Kaan
- Lithkren Vault (if the Fremennik Province is unlocked)

Notable combat-related activities:

- Abyssal Sire
- Bryophyta
- Edgeville Dungeon
- Fossil Island Wyverns
- Lumbridge Swamp Caves
- Obor
- Stronghold of Security
- Scurrius the Rat King
- Tormented Demons
- Soul Wars

Notable non-combat activities:

- Champions' Guild
- Draynor Village Rooftop Agility Course
- Fossil Island Herbiboar
- Fossil Island Hardwood Tree Patches
- Fossil Island Sulliusceps Woodcutting
- Fossil Island Volcanic Mine
- Fossil Island Birdhouse spots
- Puro-Puro Implings
- Cosmic, Earth and Water Altars
- Varrock Rooftop Agility Course
- Lumbridge and Varrock Tree Patches

Examiners will provide a level 3 certificate on request.

The following Misthalin shop stocks have been modified:

- Pestle and Mortars and Fishing Bait have been added to the Lumbridge General Store

', '2022': 'The following quests and their pre-reqs are automatically completed but will not reward any completion XP:

- Dragon Slayer
- Druidic Ritual
- Elemental Workshop I
- Tears of Guthix
- Bone Voyage
- Fairytale II - Cure a Queen
- Death to the Dorgeshuun
- Gertrude's Cat
- Romeo and Juliet
- A Soul's Bane
- Defender of Varrock (This does not complete pre-reqs)

The following tasks in the Lumbridge and Draynor Achievement Diary are automatically completed:

Easy Tasks:
- Catch some Anchovies in Al Kharid
- Mine some iron ore at the Al Kharid mine

Medium Tasks:
- Complete a lap of the Al Kharid Rooftop Course
- Grapple across the River Lum
- Craft some Lava Runes at the Fire Altar in Al Kharid
- Purchase an upgraded device from Ava

Hard Tasks:
- Cast Bones to Peaches in Al Kharid Palace
- Collect 100 tears from Tears of Guthix
- Recharge your Prayer at the Emir's Arena with Smite activated
- Purchase some Barrows Gloves from the Culinaromancer's Chest
- Take the train from Dorgesh-Kaan to Keldagrim

Elite Tasks:
- Chop some Magic Logs at the Mage Training Arena
- Perform the Quest Point Cape emote in the Wise Old Man's house

The following tasks in the Varrock Diary are automatically completed:

Medium Tasks:
- Select a colour for your kitten
- Use the Spirit Tree in the north-eastern corner of Grand Exchange
- Pick a White Tree Fruit
- Use the balloon to travel from Varrock

Hard Tasks:
- Trade furs with the Fancy Dress Seller for a Spottier Cape and equip it
- Teleport to Paddewwa

Elite Tasks:
- Use Lunar magic to make 20 Mahogany Planks in the Varrock Lumber Yard.
- Smith and fletch ten Rune Darts while in Varrock.
- Create a Summer Pie in the Cooks' Guild.

- Mahogany homes tutorial is completed.', '2023': 'The drops listed below are affected by the drop rate modifier perks granted by passive Relic unlocks.

Drop rates affected are always rounded down and are not tied to area unlocks, this list represents the key drops affected in Misthalin.

- Abyssal Whip from Abyssal Demons
- Abyssal Dagger from Abyssal Demons
- Unsired from Abyssal Sire
- Wyvern Visage from all sources
- Draconic Visage from all sources
- Dragon Limbs from all sources
- Dragon Metal Slice from Adamant dragons
- Dragon metal Lump from Rune dragons
- Hill Giant Club from Obor
- Bryophyta's Essence from Bryophyta
- Beginner clue unique rewards
- Easy clue unique rewards
- Medium clue unique rewards
- Hard clue unique rewards
- Elite clue unique rewards
- Master clue unique rewards
- All unique rewards from Superior Slayer Creatures
- Dragon pickaxes from all sources
- All unique rewards from Tormented demons
- All unique rewards from Scurrius
- Broken Zombie Axe from Armoured Zombies

'}
5977(1) {'2020': 'The Karamja area covers the entire island of Karamja along with the island of Crandor and the Realm of the Fisher King.

Instances of areas in Karamja and underground areas with an entrance in Karamja will also be included.

When purchasing a Player Owned House from an Estate Agent your house will be placed in Brimhaven so that Construction can be trained from level 1.

All transportation and teleportation through Charter Ships, Customs Officers, Gnome Gliders, Fairy Rings, Balloons and other forms of transport will require you to have unlocked access to the area your destination is in.

', '2021': 'Notable Settlements:

- Brimhaven
- Karamja Shipyard
- Musa Point
- Shilo Village
- Tai Bwo Wannai
- Mor-Ul-Rek

Notable combat-related activities:

- Brimhaven Dungeon
- Tai Bwo Wannai Dungeon
- The Fight Caves
- The Fight Pits
- Tzhaar-Ket-Rak's Challenges
- The Inferno
- Tzhaar Creatures

Notable non-combat activities:

- Brimhaven Agility Arena
- Brimhaven House Portal
- Calquat Tree Patch
- Infernal Eel Fishing
- Fruit Tree Patch
- Karambwan Fishing
- Nature Altar
- Tai Bwo Wannai Cleanup
- Teak and Mahogany Woodcutting
- Tzhaar Pickpocketing
- Tzhaar Gem Shop Thieving


', '2022': 'The following quests and their pre-reqs are automatically completed but will not reward any completion XP:

- Shilo Village

The following tasks in the Karamja Achievement Diary are automatically completed:

Easy Tasks:
- Travel to Port Sarim via the dock, east of Musa Point
- Travel to Ardougne via the port near Brimhaven

Medium Tasks:
- Use the Gnome Glider to travel to Karamja
- Charter a ship from the shipyard in the far east of Karamja
- Charter the Lady of the Waves from south of Cairn Isle to Port Khazard

Hard Tasks:
- Eat an oomlie wrap
- Collect 5 palm leaves
- Kill a deathwing in the Viyeldi Caves under the Kharazi Jungle

Elite Tasks:
- Create an Anti-venom Potion whilst standing in the Horseshoe Mine

Additionally, Tzhaar-Ket-Rak will let you do all of his challenges immediately.

', '2023': 'The drops listed below are affected by the drop rate modifier perks granted by passive Relic unlocks.

Drop rates affected are always rounded down and are not tied to area unlocks. This list represents the key drops affected in Karamja.

- All Tzhaar equipment from various Tzhaar
- Obsidian Helmet, Platelegs and Platebody from TzHaar-Ket
- Draconic Visage from all sources
- All unique rewards from Superior Slayer Creatures
- Gout Tuber


'}
5978(1) {'2020': 'The Kandarin area covers the entire Kingdom of Kandarin along with the Feldip Hills, Ape Atoll and Crash Island.

Instances of areas in Kandarin and underground areas with an entrance in Kandarin are also included (with the exception of Taverley Dungeon and the Underground Pass).

Access to the Nightmare Zone is restricted. To obtain Nightmare Zone points speak to Dominic Onion and purchase them for 1 GP each.

Access to White Wolf Mountain and the Fremennik Province bridge will be blocked by magical barriers.

All transportation and teleportation via Charter Ships, Customs Officers, Gnome Gliders, Fairy Rings, Balloons and all other transport systems will require you to have unlocked access to the area your destination is in.

The following travel options are restricted unless you have access to the appropriate area:

- The Underground Pass between Ardougne and Isafdar
- The underground tunnel between Catherby and Taverley
- The grapple shortcut between Catherby and Taverley
- The log shortcut between Sinclair Mansion and the Fremennik Province
- The gates between Kandarin and Tirannwn at Arandar
- The basalt shortcut between the Barbarian Outpost and the Lighthouse
- The doors between the Mourner Headquarters and the Temple of Light

', '2021': 'Notable Settlements:

- Ape Atoll
- Ardougne
- Barbarian Outpost
- Catherby
- Corsair Cove
- Gu'Tanoth
- Myths Guild
- Piscatoris Fishing Colony
- Port Khazard
- Seers' Village
- Tree Gnome Stronghold
- Tree Gnome Village
- Yanille

Notable combat-related activities:

- Ancient Cavern
- Ape Atoll Monkeys
- Barbarian Assault
- Castle Wars
- Demonic Gorillas
- Kraken
- Stronghold Slayer Cave
- Smoke Devils
- Thermonuclear Smoke Devil
- Waterfall Dungeon
- Poison Waste Dungeon

Notable non-combat activities:

- Ardougne Market Thieving
- Ardougne Rooftop Agility Course
- Ardougne & Catherby Allotment Patches
- Catherby, Gnome Stronghold & Tree Gnome Stronghold Fruit Tree Patches
- Barbarian Fishing
- Barbarian Agility Training
- Catherby Fishing
- Chompy Bird Hunting
- Feldip Hills Hunter Training
- Fishing Trawler
- Gnome Stronghold Agility Training
- Gnome Stronghold Tree Patch
- Fishing Guild
- Myths' Guild (if the Fremennik Province is unlocked)
- Piscatoris Hunter Training Grounds
- Ourania Altar
- Wrath Altar (if the Fremennik Province is unlocked)
- Seers' Village Rooftop Agility Course
- Spirit Tree Access
- Tower of Life
- Yanille House Portal

', '2022': 'The following quests and their pre-reqs are automatically completed but will not reward any completion XP:

- Monkey Madness II
- Swan Song
- King's Ransom

The following tasks in the Kandarin Achievement Diary are automatically completed:

Medium Tasks:
- Use the Grapple Shortcut to get from the Water Obelisk to Catherby beach

Hard Tasks:
- Charge a water orb
- Kill a shadow hound in the Shadow Dungeon

Elite Tasks:
- Fish and cook 5 sharks in Catherby using the Cooking Gauntlets
- Teleport to Catherby

The following tasks in the Western Provinces Achievement Diary are automatically completed:

Easy Tasks:
- Complete a novice game of Pest Control
- Teleport to Pest Control using the minigame teleports

Medium Tasks:
- Complete an intermediate game of Pest Control

Hard Tasks:
- Complete a veteran game of Pest Control
- Place an Isafdar painting in your Player Owned House Quest Hall

Elite Tasks:
- Equip any complete Void set

The following tasks in the Ardougne Achievement Diary are automatically completed:

Easy Tasks:
- Enter the combat training camp north of West Ardougne
- Use the Ardougne lever to teleport to the Wilderness

Medium Tasks:
- Travel to Castle Wars by hot air balloon
- Claim buckets of sand from Bert in Yanille
- Equip an Iban's Upgraded Staff or upgrade an Iban's Staff

Hard Tasks:
- Recharge some jewellery at the totem pole in the Legends' Guild
- Smith a Dragon Square Shield in West Ardougne
- Craft some Death Runes at the Death Altar

Elite Tasks:
- Imbue a Salve Amulet at Nightmare Zone or equip a Salve Amulet(i)
- Cast Ice Barrage on another player within Castle Wars

The following bars will be automatically completed on Alfred Grimhand's Barcrawl:

- The Rising Sun in Falador
- The Rusty Anchor in Port Sarim

', '2023': 'The drops listed below are affected by the drop rate modifier perks granted by passive Relic unlocks.

Drop rates affected are always rounded down and are not tied to area unlocks. This list represents the key drops affected in Kandarin.

- Angler's Outfit from Fishing Trawler
- Zenyte Shards and Ballista components from Glough's Experiments
- Monkey Tails from Maniacal Monkey Hunting
- Trident of the Seas and Kraken Tentacles from all sources
- Occult Necklaces from all sources
- Smoke Battlestaves from all sources
- Dragon Chainbodies from all sources
- Dragon Full Helmets from all sources
- Warped Sceptre from Warped Creatures
- All unique rewards from Superior Slayer Creatures
- Smouldering Stone from Hellhounds


'}
5979(1) {'2020': 'The Asgarnia area covers the entire Kingdom of Asgarnia along with the island of Entrana, the Pest Control islands, and Troll Country.

Instances of areas in Asgarnia and underground areas with an entrance in Asgarnia will also be included.

Access to Catherby from White Wolf Mountain will be restricted and prevented through the use of magical barriers.

All transportation and teleportation via Charter Ships, Customs Officers, Gnome Gliders, Fairy Rings, Balloons and all other forms of transport will require you to have unlocked access to the area your destination is in.

The following travel options are restricted unless you have access to the appropriate area:

- The under-wall shortcut between Port Sarim and Draynor Village
- The rubble shortcut between Death Plateau and the Fremennik Province
- The cave between Trollweiss and Keldagrim
- The rock-climb shortcut between the Troll Stronghold and the Wilderness
- The rock-climb shortcut between the God Wars Dungeon and the Wilderness
- The ladder between Taverley Dungeon and the Water Obelisk
- The underground tunnel between Taverley and Catherby
- The cave between Entrana and the Wilderness

', '2021': 'Notable Settlements:

- Burthorpe
- Ruins of Camdozaal
- Ice Mountain
- Dwarven Mine
- Entrana
- Falador
- Goblin Village
- God Wars Dungeon
- Port Sarim
- Rimmington
- Taverley
- Troll Stronghold
- Void Knights' Outpost

Notable combat-related activities:

- Asgarnia Ice Dungeon
- The Whisperer
- Cerberus
- Giant Mole
- God Wars Dungeon (with Nex)
- Taverley Dungeon
- Warriors Guild
- Pest Control

Notable non-combat activities:

- Crafting Guild
- Falador Rooftop Agility Course
- Falador Tree Patch
- Falador Allotment Patch
- Water Obelisk (with Kandarin unlocked)
- Fire Obelisk
- Heroes' Guild
- Motherlode Mine
- Rimmington House Portal
- Rogue's Den
- Mahogany Homes
- Mining Guild
- Air, Body, Law and Mind Altars
- Taverley House Portal
- Taverley Tree Patch
- Troll Stronghold Herb Patch

', '2022': 'The following quests and their pre-reqs are automatically completed but will not reward any completion XP:

- Merlin's Crystal
- My Arm's Big Adventure
- Below Ice Mountain
- Dwarf Cannon

The following tasks in the Falador Achievement Diary are automatically completed:

Medium Tasks:
- Visit the Port Sarim Rat Pits

Hard Tasks:
- Recharge your Prayer in Port Sarim church while wearing full Proselyte

Elite Tasks:
- Purchase a white 2-handed sword from Sir Vyvin

Additionally, you will be eligible to complete The Frozen Door, if you haven't already. It will not be auto-completed.

', '2023': 'The drops listed below are affected by the drop rate modifier perks granted by passive Relic unlocks.

Drop rates affected are always rounded down and are not tied to area unlocks. This list represents the key drops affected in Asgarnia.

- All Defenders from Cyclops
- All unique rewards from Cerberus
- All unique rewards from Kree'arra
- All unique rewards from General Graardor
- All unique rewards from Commander Zilyana
- All unique rewards from Kril Tsu'tsaroth
- Dragon Boots from spiritual mages
- All unique rewards from Nex
- All unique rewards from The Whisperer
- All unique rewards from Superior Slayer Creatures
- Smouldering Stone from Hellhounds


'}
5980(1) {'2020': 'The Fremennik Province area covers the entire Fremennik Province (including the Fremennik Isles) along with Lunar Isle and Weiss.

Instances of areas in the Fremennik Province and underground areas with an entrance in the Fremennik Province will also be included.

Access to Kandarin via the bridge south of Rellekka will be blocked by magical barriers.

All transportation and teleportation via Charter Ships, Customs Officers, Gnome Gliders, Fairy Rings, Balloons and all other forms of transport will require you to have unlocked access to the area your destination is in.

The following travel options are restricted unless you have access to the appropriate area:

- The log shortcut leading to the Fremennik Province north of Sinclair Manor
- The rubble separating the Fremennik Province and the Death Plateau
- The Cave entrance in the tunnel leading to Keldagrim that leads to the bottom of Trollweiss mountain
- The basalt rock Agility shortcut leading from the Lighthouse to the Barbarian Outpost

', '2021': 'Notable Settlements:

- Keldagrim
- Ghorrock Dungeon
- Lunar Isle
- Miscellania and Etceteria
- Neitiznot and Jatizso
- Rellekka
- The Island of Stone
- The Mountain Camp
- The Pirates' Cove
- Ungael
- Waterbirth Island
- Weiss

Notable combat-related activities:

- Basilisk Knights
- Duke Sucellus
- The Phantom Muspah
- Dagannoth Kings
- Rellekka Slayer Cave
- Waterbirth Island Dungeon
- Vorkath

Notable non-combat activities:

- Blast Furnace (operated by dwarves)
- Kingdom Management
- Penguin Agility Course
- Rellekka House Portal
- Rellekka Rooftop Agility Course
- Astral Altar
- Weiss Herb Patch

Ice Gloves will be provided upon unlocking this area and can be reclaimed from the Sage in Lumbridge if lost.

', '2022': 'The following quests and their pre-reqs are automatically completed but will not reward any completion XP:

- Secrets of the North (This does not complete DT1 and its pre-reqs)
- Horror from the Deep
- Dragon Slayer II
- Mountain Daughter
- Fremennik Trials
- Fremennik Isles
- Olaf's Quest

The following tasks in the Fremennik Diary are automatically completed:

Easy Tasks:
- Enter the Troll Stronghold

Medium Tasks:
- Mine some gold at the Arzinian Mine
- Travel to the Snowy Hunter Area via Eagle

Hard Tasks:
- Teleport to Trollheim

Elite Tasks:
- Kill the generals of Armadyl, Bandos, Saradomin and Zamorak in the God Wars Dungeon
- Slay a spiritual mage in the God Wars Dungeon.

- You will also automatically unlock the ability to make Super Antifire potions.

', '2023': 'The drops listed below are affected by the drop rate modifier perks granted by passive Relic unlocks.

Drop rates affected are always rounded down and are not tied to area unlocks. This list represents the key drops affected in the Fremennik Province.

- Skeletal Visages from Vorkath
- Draconic Visages from all sources
- Dragonbone Necklaces from Vorkath
- Seers' Rings from Dagannoth Prime
- Mud Battlestaves from Dagannoth Prime
- Archer Rings from Dagannoth Supreme
- Seercull Bows from Dagannoth Supreme
- Warrior Rings from Dagannoth Rex
- Berserker Rings from Dagannoth Rex
- Dragon Axes from all sources
- Basilisk Jaws from Basilisk Knights
- Leaf-bladed Swords from all sources
- Leaf-bladed Battleaxes from Kurasks
- Brine Sabre from Brine Rats
- All unique rewards from Duke Sucellus
- All unique rewards from The Phantom Muspah
- All unique rewards from Superior Slayer Creatures


'}
5981(1) {'2020': 'The Tirannwn area covers the entirety of Tirannwn along with the Temple of Light and the Underground Pass.

Instances of areas in Tirannwn and underground areas with an entrance in Tirannwn will also be included.

All transportation and teleportation via Charter Ships, Customs Officers, Gnome Gliders, Fairy Rings, Balloons and other forms of transport will require you to have unlocked access to the area your destination is in.

The following travel options are restricted unless you have access to the appropriate area:

- The gate in Arandar leading to Kandarin
- The entrance to the Mourner Headquarters near the Temple of Light
- The Underground Pass exit leading to West Ardougne

', '2021': 'Notable Settlements:

- Gwenith
- Iorwerth Camp
- Lletya
- Prifddinas
- Tyras Camp
- Zul-Andra

Notable combat-related activities:

- A 'Rabbit'
- Iorwerth Slayer Dungeon
- The Gauntlet
- Zulrah

Notable non-combat activities:

- Enhanced Crystal Chest
- The Death Altar
- Lletya Fruit Tree Patch
- Prifddinas Allotment Patch
- Prifddinas Agility Course
- Prifddinas Crystal Implings
- Prifddinas Hunting Grounds
- Prifddinas House Portal
- Prifddinas Hardwood Trees
- Prifddinas Thieving
- Sacred Eel Fishing
- Zalcano

', '2022': 'The following quests and their pre-reqs are automatically completed but will not reward any completion XP:

- Song of the Elves

', '2023': 'The drops listed below are affected by the drop rate modifier perks granted by passive Relic unlocks.

Drop rates affected are always rounded down and are not tied to area unlocks. This list represents the key drops affected in Tirannwn.

Group content like Zalcano will determine the drop rate modifier for their uniques from the MVP of that particular kill/completion.

- Elven Signet from Crystal Implings
- Crystal Armour Seeds from The Gauntlet
- Crystal Weapon Seeds from The Gauntlet
- Enhanced Crystal Weapon Seeds from The Gauntlet
- Crystal Tool Seeds from Zalcano
- Zalcano Shards from Zalcano
- Tanzanite Fangs from Zulrah
- Magic Fangs from Zulrah
- Serpentine Visages from Zulrah
- Onyxes from Zulrah
- Dark Bows from Dark Beasts
- Dragonstone Armour from the Enhanced Crystal Chest
- Enhanced Crystal Teleport Seeds from all sources
- Mist Battlestaves from Waterfiends
- Leaf-bladed Battleaxes and Swords from Kurasks
- All unique rewards from Superior Slayer Creatures


'}
5982(1) {'2020': 'The Morytania area covers the entirety of Morytania along with the island of Mos Le'Harmless, Braindeath Island, Dragontooth Island and Harmony Island.

Instances of areas in Morytania and underground areas with an entrance in Morytania will also be included.

All transportation and teleportation via Charter Ships, Customs Officers, Gnome Gliders, Fairy Rings, Balloons and other forms of transport will require you to have unlocked access to the area your destination is in.

The following travel options are restricted unless you have access to the appropriate area:

- The Agility shortcut through the railing next to the Paterdomus Temple leading to Misthalin
- The stairs leading from the Paterdomus Temple up to Misthalin

', '2021': 'Notable Settlements:

- Burgh de Rott
- Mos Le'Harmless
- Canifis
- Darkmeyer
- Meiyerditch
- Mort'ton
- Port Phasmatys
- Slepe
- Ver Sinhaza

Notable combat-related activities:

- Barrows
- Cave Horrors
- Fenkenstrain's Experiments
- Grotesque Guardians
- Haunted Mines
- Morytania Spider Cave
- Nightmare of Ashihama
- Lair of Tarn Razorlor
- Shades of Mort'ton
- Slayer Tower
- Theatre of Blood
- Vyrewatch Sentinels

Notable non-combat activities:

- Canifis Rooftop Agility Course
- Daeyalt Essence Mining
- Ectofuntus Prayer Training
- The True Blood Altar
- Hallowed Sepulchre
- Harmony Island Herb Patch
- Port Phasmatys Allotment Patch
- Temple Trekking
- Vyre Pickpocketing
- Werewolf Agility Course

The following Morytania shop stocks have been modified:
- Blood Talisman has been added to the Canifis General Store


', '2022': 'The following quests and their pre-reqs are automatically completed but will not reward any completion XP:

- Taste of Hope
- The Great Brain Robbery
- Ghosts Ahoy

The following tasks in the Morytania Achievement Diary are automatically completed:

Medium Tasks:
- Make a batch of Cannonballs at the Port Phasmatys furnace

Hard Tasks:
- Enter the Kharyrll portal in your Player Owned House through a Portal Chamber
- Pray at the Altar of Nature in the Nature Grotto with Piety activated

Elite Tasks:
- Catch a shark in Burgh de Rott with your bare hands
- Fertilize the Morytania herb patch using Lunar spells

', '2023': 'Theatre of Blood: Hard mode and Phosanis nightmare have the following changes:

- Damage & Defence increased by 25%
- 50% increased hitpoints on monsters
- Unique chance will be further multiplied by 2.

The drops listed below are affected by the drop rate modifier perks granted by passive Relic unlocks.

Drop rates affected are always rounded down and are not tied to area unlocks. This list represents the key drops affected in Morytania.

Group content like The Nightmare and Theatre of Blood will determine the drop rate modifier for their uniques from the MVP of that particular kill/completion.

- Black masks from Cave horrors.
- Barrows armour and weapon pieces from The Barrows
- Granite Gloves from Grotesque Guardians
- Granite Hammers from Grotesque Guardians
- Granite Rings from Grotesque Guardians
- Dark Tourmaline Cores from Grotesque Guardians
- Rings of Endurance (uncharged) from The Hallowed Sepulchre
- Blood Shards from Vyres.
- All unique rewards from the Theatre of Blood
- All unique rewards from The Nightmare
- All unique rewards from Superior Slayer Creatures
- Zealot Robes from Shades of Morton
- Runescrolls from Shades of Morton
- Granite Maul from Gargoyles
- Brittle Key from Gargoyles
- All unique rewards from Araxxor and Araxytes


'}
5983(1) {'2020': 'The Kharidian Desert area covers the entirety of the Kharidian Desert.

The Emir's Arena minigame will not be available during this League, although the building itself is accessible.

Instances of areas in the Kharidian Desert and underground areas with an entrance in the Kharidian Desert will also be included.


All transportation and teleportation via Charter Ships, Customs Officers, Gnome Gliders, Fairy Rings, Balloons or any other form of transport will require you to have unlocked access to the area your destination is in.


', '2021': 'Notable Settlements:

- Bandit Camp
- Necropolis
- Ruins of Unkah
- Bedabin Camp
- Desert Mining Camp
- Nardah
- Pollnivneach
- Ruins of Uzer
- Uzer Oasis
- Giants' Plateau
- Sophanem

Notable combat-related activities:

- Bandits
- Kalphite Queen
- Pollnivneach Slayer Dungeon
- Tombs of Amascut
- The Leviathan

Notable non-combat activities:

- Agility Pyramid
- Mage Training Arena
- Giants Foundry
- Guardians of the Rift
- Nardah Elidinis Statuette
- Pollnivneach blackjacking
- Pollnivneach House Portal
- Pollnivneach Rooftop Agility Course
- Pyramid Plunder
- Fire Altar
- Sandstone and Granite Mining
- Sandstorm Machine
- Sorceress' Garden
- Zahur's Herblore Services
- Tempoross

', '2022': 'The following quests and their pre-reqs are automatically completed but will not reward any completion XP:

- Desert Treasure II
- Prince Ali Rescue
- Icthlarin's Little Helper

The following tasks in the Desert Achievement Diary are automatically completed:

Medium Tasks:
- Travel to the Desert via the Eagle transport system

Hard Tasks:
- Slay a dust devil in the desert cave with a Slayer Helmet equipped
- Refill your Waterskins in the Desert using Lunar spells

Elite Tasks:
- Bake a wild pie at the Nardah clay oven
- Speak to the Kalphite Queen Head in your Player Owned House

The above Kalphite Queen Head diary task will complete when you receive a Kalphite Queen Head or Kalphite Queen Head(tattered) drop instead.

', '2023': 'Tombs of Amascut has 2 new invocations, meaning max raid level can go up to 1000

The drops listed below are affected by the drop rate modifier perks granted by passive Relic unlocks.

Drop rates affected are always rounded down and are not tied to area unlocks. This list represents the key drops affected in The Desert.

- The Pharaoh's Sceptre from Pyramid Plunder
- Dragon Chainbodies from all sources
- Dragon 2-handed Swords from all sources
- Dust Battlestaves from Dust Devils
- All unique rewards from Superior Slayer Creatures
- All unique rewards from Tombs of Amascut
- All unique rewards from The Leviathan
- All unique rewards from Tempoross
- All unique rewards from Guardians of the Rift
- Dragon pickaxe from all sources


'}
5984(1) {'2020': 'The Wilderness area covers the entirety of the Wilderness.

Last Man Standing and Bounty Hunter will not be accessible during this League.

For this League, deaths will behave differently in the Wilderness:

- PvP deaths will be treated like a PvM death with your lost items moving to a gravestone. The gravestone will then move to your respawn location.
- PvM deaths will be unaffected.
- Loot keys are disabled on League Worlds.

Instances of areas in the Wilderness and underground areas with an entrance in the Wilderness will also be included.

All transportation and teleportation via Charter Ships, Customs Officers, Gnome Gliders, Fairy Rings, Balloons and other forms of transport require you to have unlocked access to the area your destination is in.

The following travel options are restricted unless you have access to the appropriate area:

- Crossing the Wilderness Ditch will require access to whichever area is on the other side of it
- The lever at the Deserted Keep will work only if you have access to the area it takes you to

', '2021': 'Notable Settlements:

- Bandit Camp
- Dark Warriors' Fortress
- Ferox Enclave
- The Mage Arena
- Rogues' Castle
- The Pirates' Hideout

Notable combat-related activities:

- Callisto and Artio
- Chaos Elemental
- Chaos Fanatic
- Corporeal Beast
- Crazy Archaeologist
- Forthinry Dungeon
- King Black Dragon
- Lava Dragons
- Mage Arena
- Mage Arena II
- Scorpia
- Venenatis and Spindel
- Vet'ion and Calvar'ion
- Wilderness God Wars Dungeon
- Wilderness Slayer Cave

Notable non-combat activities:

- Abyss Runecrafting
- Altar access is restricted to their areas
- Air Obelisk
- Black Chinchompas
- Black Salamanders
- Dark Crab Fishing
- Earth Obelisk
- Fountain of Rune
- Chaos Altar
- Wilderness Agility Course
- Wilderness Resource Area
- Rogue Chests

Access to the Revenant Caves will be free instead of requiring 100, 000 coins to enter.

Access to the Wilderness Agility Course will be free instead of requiring 150, 000 coins to enter.

Dying will not reset your lap counter in the Wilderness Agility Course.



Krystillia assigns tasks like any other Slayer Master, not assigning Wilderness-specific tasks.

Slayer targets defeated within the Wilderness will have a chance to drop a Larran's Key.



', '2022': 'The following quest is automatically completed but will not award any completion XP:

- Enter the Abyss

The following tasks in the Wilderness Achievement Diary are automatically completed:

Medium Tasks:
- Smith a Gold Helmet in the resource area

Hard Tasks:
- Take the Agility shortcut from Trollheim to the Wilderness
- Fish a raw lava eel in the Wilderness

Elite Tasks:
- Teleport to Ghorrock


', '2023': 'The drops listed below are affected by the drop rate modifier perks granted by passive Relic unlocks.

Drop rates affected are always rounded down and are not tied to area unlocks. This list represents the key drops affected in the Wilderness.

- All unique rewards from Revenants
- Malediction and Odium shards from all sources
- Fedoras from the Crazy Archaeologist
- Dragon Boots from spiritual mages
- Dragon 2-handed Swords from all sources
- Dragon Pickaxes from all sources
- All unique rewards from Venenatis
- All unique rewards from Callisto
- All unique rewards from Vet'ion
- Draconic Visages from all sources
- Amulets of Eternal Glory from the Fountain of Rune
- Dagon'hai robes from Larran's Big Chest
- All unique rewards from the Corporeal Beast
- All unique rewards from Superior Slayer Creatures
- All unique rewards from Zombie Pirates and Zombie Pirate Lockers
- All unique rewards from Elder Chaos Druids
- Smouldering Stone from Hellhounds


'}
5985(1) {'2020': 'The Kebos and Kourend area covers the entirety of Kebos and Kourend.

Instances of areas in Kebos and Kourend and underground areas with an entrance in Kebos and Kourend will also be included.

All transportation and teleportation via Charter Ships, Customs Officers, Gnome Gliders, Fairy Rings, Balloons and all other forms of transport will require you to have unlocked access to the area your destination is in.



', '2021': 'Notable Settlements:

- Hosidius
- Arceuus
- Lovakengj
- Port Piscarilius
- Shayzien
- Kingstown
- Northern Tundras
- Kourend Woodland
- Mount Karuulm
- Kebos Swamp
- Mount Quidamortem

Notable combat-related activities:

- Chambers of Xeric
- Lizardman Shaman
- Mount Karuulm Slayer Dungeon
- Sarachnis (Forthos Dungeon)
- Catacombs of Kourend
- Giants' Den

Notable non-combat activities:

- Farming Guild
- Woodcutting Guild
- Arceuus Library
- Hosidius House Portal
- Tithe Farm
- Lake Molch Aerial Fishing
- The Wintertodt
- Soul and Blood Altar
- Blast Mine
- Hosidius Patches

Konar will assign Slayer Tasks based on the areas you have unlocked.


', '2022': 'The following quests and their pre-reqs are automatically completed but will not reward any completion XP:
- A Kingdom Divided

The following tasks in the Kourend and Kebos Achievement Diary are automatically completed:

Hard Tasks:
- Cast Monster Examine on a mountain troll south of Mount Quidamortem.

', '2023': 'Chambers of Xeric: Challenge mode has the following changes

- Damage & Defence increased by 25%
- 50% increased hitpoints on monsters
- Unique chance will be further multiplied by 3.

-The drops listed below are affected by the drop rate modifier perks granted by passive Relic unlocks.

Drop rates affected are always rounded down and are not tied to area unlocks. This list represents the key drops affected in Kebos and Kourend.

- All unique rewards from Chambers of Xeric
- All unique rewards from Wintertodt
- Dragon Thrownaxe and Dragon Knife from Drakes, Hydras and Wyrms
- Hydra's Claw, Hydra's Leather, Hydra's Eye, Hydra's Heart, Hydra's Fang and Hydra Tail from Hydras
- Drake's Tooth and Drake's Claw from Drakes
- Dragon Sword and Dragon Harpoon from Wyrms
- Dragon Warhammer from lizardman shamans
- Draconic Visage from dragons in the Catacombs of Kourend
- Sarachnis Cudgel from Sarachnis
- Bottomless Compost Bucket from Hespori
- Dusk Mystic and Dragon Hasta from the Brimstone Chest
- All unique rewards from Superior Slayer Creatures
- Hespori seeds
- Golden Tench from Aerial Fishing

'}
5986(1) {'2020': 'The Varlamore area covers the entirety of Varlamore, including the island of Aldarin.

Instances of areas in Varlamore and underground areas with an entrance in Varlamore will also be included.

All transportation and teleportation via Charter Ships, Customs Officers, Gnome Gliders, Fairy Rings, Balloons and all other forms of transport will require you to have unlocked access to the area your destination is in.



', '2021': 'Notable Settlements:

- Civitas illa Fortis
- Avium Savannah
- Cam Torum
- Ralos Rise
- Darkfrost
- Aldarin
- Twilight Temple
- The Stranglewood (accessable via a league navigator in northern Varlamore)
- Ruins of Tapoyauik

Notable combat-related activities:

- Moons of Peril
- Fortis Colosseum
- Amoxliatl
- Hueycoatl
- Vardorvis

Notable non-combat activities:

- House robbery
- Calcified mining
- Blessed bone shards
- Hunter's guild with Hunter rumours
- Mastering Mixology Herblore activity
- Colossal Wyrm agility course
- Civitas Illa Fortis allotment patch
- Oasis Hardwood Tree patch
- Crafting Sunfire Runes

The following Varlamore shop stocks have been modified:
- Hunting crossbow at the Sunset coast charter ships.

', '2022': 'The following quests and their pre-reqs are automatically completed but will not reward any completion XP:

- Children of the Sun
- Twilight's Promise
- Heart of Darkness
- At First Light

', '2023': 'The drops listed below are affected by the drop rate modifier perks granted by passive Relic unlocks.

Drop rates affected are always rounded down and are not tied to area unlocks. This list represents the key drops affected in Varlamore.

- All unique rewards from Moons of Peril
- All unique rewards from the Colosseum
- All unique rewards from Amoxliatl
- All unique rewards from Frost Nagua
- All unique rewards from Sulphur Nagua
- All unique rewards from Hueycoatl
- All unique rewards from Vardorvis
- Pendant of Ates
- Hunters' Guild loot sack rares
- Tecu Salamander
'}

6239(1) {'1251': 'Notifications - Leagues', '1551': 1, '1552': 'Leagues'}
6240(1) {'1251': 'Shared league broadcasts', '1252': 'Rank required to receive regular notifications from other clan members whilst they are playing on a Leagues world. This will abide by any settings or thresholds the clan has already set for any specific notifications.', '1292': 1}
6241(1) {'1251': 'Relic tier', '1252': 'Rank required to receive notifications from other clan members unlocking a new relic tier in a league.', '1292': 1}
6242(1) {'1251': 'Area unlocks', '1252': 'Rank required to receive notifications from other clan members unlocking a new area in a league.', '1292': 1}
6243(1) {'1251': 'League rank', '1252': 'Rank required to receive notifications from other clan members earning trophy ranks in a league.', '1292': 1}
6244(1) {'1251': 'Combat Masteries', '1252': 'Rank required to receive notifications from other clan members earning combat mastery points.', '1292': 1}

1711(1) {'1012': 'The Misthalin area covers the entire Kingdom of Misthalin along with Fossil Island, Zanaris and the Abyss.

Instances of areas in Misthalin and underground areas with an entrance in Misthalin will also be included.

Access to Al Kharid, Port Sarim and the western exit of Barbarian Village is blocked by magical barriers.

All transportation and teleportation through Charter Ships, Customs Officers, Gnome Gliders, Fairy Rings, Balloons, or any other transport system will require you to have unlocked access to the area your destination is in.

The following travel options are restricted unless you have access to the appropriate area:

- The gate between Lumbridge and Al Kharid
- The entrance to the Kalphite Hive from Dorgesh Kaan Dungeon
- The grapple shortcut between Lumbridge and Al Kharid
- The stepping stone between Lumbridge Swamp and the Kalphite Lair
- The under-wall shortcut between Draynor Village and Port Sarim
- The underground sections of the Paterdomus Temple
- The railing shortcut between the Paterdomus Temple and Canifis', '1013': 'Notable Settlements:

- Barbarian Village
- Draynor Village
- Edgeville
- Fossil Island
- Lumbridge
- The Digsite
- Varrock
- Zanaris
- Isle of Souls and Soul Wars

Notable combat-related activities:

- Abyssal Sire
- Bryophyta
- Chaeldar Slayer Tasks
- Edgeville Dungeon
- Fossil Island Wyverns
- Lumbridge Swamp Caves
- Obor
- Stronghold of Security
- Vannaka Slayer Tasks

Notable non-combat activities:

- Champions' Guild
- Draynor Village Rooftop Agility Course
- Fossil Island Herbiboar
- Fossil Island Hardwood Tree Patches
- Fossil Island Sulliusceps Woodcutting
- Fossil Island Volcanic Mine
- Puro-Puro Implings
- Cosmic, Earth and Water Altars
- Varrock Rooftop Agility Course

Thessalia in Varrock will offer additional makeover services.

All Slayer Masters will assign tasks from the same Slayer list and assign the same number of Slayer Points on task completion.

Slayer Tasks will still respect Slayer and Combat Level requirements.

Elemental Shields have been added to all Slayer Equipment shops.

Unlocking Misthalin will add the following tasks to your Slayer list:

- Cows (while under level 50 Combat)
- Goblins (while under level 50 Combat)
- Minotaurs (while under level 50 Combat)
- Zombies (while under level 50 Combat)
- Abyssal Demons
- Ankou
- Fossil Island Wyverns
- Hill Giants
- Moss Giants
- Spiders

The following Misthalin shop stocks have been modified:

- Pestle and Mortars have been added to the Lumbridge General Store
- Black Platelegs have been added to Horvik's Armour Shop', '1014': 'The following quests and their pre-reqs are automatically completed but will not reward any completion XP:

- Dragon Slayer
- Druidic Ritual
- Elemental Workshop I
- Tears of Guthix
- Bone Voyage
- Fairytale II - Cure a Queen

The following tasks in the Lumbridge and Draynor Achievement Diary are automatically completed:

Easy Tasks:
- Catch some Anchovies in Al Kharid
- Mine some iron ore at the Al Kharid mine

Medium Tasks:
- Complete a lap of the Al Kharid Rooftop Course
- Grapple across the River Lum
- Craft some Lava Runes at the Fire Altar in Al Kharid
- Purchase an upgraded device from Ava

Hard Tasks:
- Cast Bones to Peaches in Al Kharid Palace
- Light your Mining Helmet in Lumbridge Basement
- Collect 100 tears from Tears of Guthix
- Recharge your Prayer at the Emir's Arena with Smite activated
- Purchase some Barrows Gloves from the Culinaromancer's Chest
- Take the train from Dorgesh-Kaan to Keldagrim

Elite Tasks:
- Chop some Magic Logs at the Mage Training Arena
- Steal from a Dorgesh-Kaan rich chest
- Pickpocket Movario on the Dorgesh-Kaan Agility Course
- Perform the Quest Point Cape emote in the Wise Old Man's house

The following tasks in the Varrock Diary are automatically completed:

Medium Tasks:
- Select a colour for your kitten
- Use the Spirit Tree in the north-eastern corner of Grand Exchange
- Pick a White Tree Fruit
- Use the balloon to travel from Varrock

Hard Tasks:
- Trade furs with the Fancy Dress Seller for a Spottier Cape and equip it
- Teleport to Paddewwa

Elite Tasks:
- Use Lunar magic to make 20 Mahogany Planks in the Varrock Lumber Yard
- Smith and fletch ten Rune Darts while in Varrock', '1015': 'The drops listed below are affected by the drop rate modifier perks granted by passive Relic unlocks.

Drop rates affected are always rounded down and are not tied to area unlocks, this list represents the key drops affected in Misthalin.

- Abyssal Whip from Abyssal Demons
- Abyssal Dagger from Abyssal Demons
- Unsired from Abyssal Sire
- Wyvern Visage from all sources
- Draconic Visage from all sources
- Dragon Limbs from all sources
- Dragon Metal Slice from Adamant dragons
- Dragon metal Lump from Rune dragons
- Hill Giant Club from Obor
- Bryophyta's Essence from Bryophyta
- Beginner clue unique items
- Easy clue unique items
- Medium clue unique items
- Hard clue unique items
- Elite clue unique items
- Master clue unique items
- All unique drops from Superior Slayer Creatures
- Dragon pickaxes from all sources'}
1712(1) {'1012': 'The Karamja area covers the entire island of Karamja along with the island of Crandor and the Realm of the Fisher King.

Instances of areas in Karamja and underground areas with an entrance in Karamja will also be included.

When purchasing a Player Owned House from an Estate Agent your house will be placed in Brimhaven so that Construction can be trained from level 1.

All transportation and teleportation through Charter Ships, Customs Officers, Gnome Gliders, Fairy Rings, Balloons and other forms of transport will require you to have unlocked access to the area your destination is in.', '1013': 'Notable Settlements:

- Brimhaven
- Karamja Ship Yard
- Musa Point
- Shilo Village
- Tai Bwo Wannai
- Mor-Ul-Rek

Notable combat-related activities:

- Brimhaven Dungeon
- Duradel Slayer Tasks
- Tai Bwo Wannai Dungeon
- The Fight Caves
- The Fight Pits
- Tzhaar-Ket-Rak's Challenges
- The Inferno
- Tzhaar Creatures

Notable non-combat activities:

- Brimhaven Agility Arena
- Brimhaven House Portal
- Calquat Tree Patch
- Infernal Eel Fishing
- Fruit Tree Patch
- Karambwan Fishing
- Nature Altar
- Tai Bwo Wannai Cleanup
- Teak and Mahogany Woodcutting
- Tzhaar Pickpocketing
- Tzhaar Gem Shop Thieving

All Slayer Masters will assign tasks from the same Slayer list and assign the same number of Slayer Points on task completion.

Slayer tasks will still respect Slayer and Combat Level requirements.

Elemental Shields have been added to all Slayer Equipment shops.

Unlocking Karamja will add the following tasks to your Slayer list:

- Fire Giants
- Greater Demons
- Harpie Bug Swarms
- Iron Dragons
- Steel Dragons
- Tzhaar', '1014': 'The following quests and their pre-reqs are automatically completed but will not reward any completion XP:

- Shilo Village

The following tasks in the Karamja Achievement Diary are automatically completed:

Easy Tasks:
- Travel to Port Sarim via the dock, east of Musa Point
- Travel to Ardougne via the port near Brimhaven

Medium Tasks:
- Use the Gnome Glider to travel to Karamja
- Charter a ship from the shipyard in the far east of Karamja
- Charter the Lady of the Waves from south of Cairn Isle to Port Khazard

Hard Tasks:
- Eat an oomlie wrap
- Collect 5 palm leaves
- Kill a deathwing in the Viyeldi Caves under the Kharazi Jungle

Elite Tasks:
- Create an Anti-venom Potion whilst standing in the Horseshoe Mine

Additionally, Tzhaar-Ket-Rak will let you do all of his challenges immediately.', '1015': 'The drops listed below are affected by the drop rate modifier perks granted by passive Relic unlocks.

Drop rates affected are always rounded down and are not tied to area unlocks. This list represents the key drops affected in Karamja.

- All Tzhaar equipment from various Tzhaar
- Obsidian Helmet, Platelegs and Platebody from TzHaar-Ket
- Draconic Visage from all sources
- All unique drops from Superior Slayer Creatures'}
1713(1) {'1012': 'The Kandarin area covers the entire Kingdom of Kandarin along with the Feldip Hills, Ape Atoll and Crash Island.

Instances of areas in Kandarin and underground areas with an entrance in Kandarin will also be included (with the exception of Taverley Dungeon and the Underground Pass).

Access to Nightmare Zone is restricted. To obtain Nightmare Zone points speak to Dominic Onion and purchase them for 1 GP each.

Access to White Wolf Mountain and the Fremennik Province bridge will be blocked by magical barriers.

All transportation and teleportation via Charter Ships, Customs Officers, Gnome Gliders, Fairy Rings, Balloons and all other transport systems will require you to have unlocked access to the area your destination is in.

The following travel options are restricted unless you have access to the appropriate area:

- The Underground Pass between Ardougne and Isafdar
- The underground tunnel between Catherby and Taverley
- The grapple shortcut between Catherby and Taverley
- The log shortcut between Sinclair Mansion and the Fremennik Province
- The gates between Kandarin and Tirannwn at Arandar
- The basalt shortcut between the Barbarian Outpost and the Lighthouse
- The doors between the Mourner Headquarters and the Temple of Light', '1013': 'Notable Settlements:

- Ape Atoll
- Ardougne
- Barbarian Outpost
- Catherby
- Corsair Cove
- Gu'Tanoth
- Myths Guild
- Piscatoris Fishing Colony
- Port Khazard
- Seers' Village
- Tree Gnome Stronghold
- Tree Gnome Village
- Yanille

Notable combat-related activities:

- Ancient Cavern
- Ape Atoll Monkeys
- Barbarian Assault
- Castle Wars
- Demonic Gorillas
- Kraken
- Stronghold Slayer Cave
- Steve Slayer Tasks
- Smoke Devils
- Thermonuclear Smoke Devil
- Waterfall Dungeon
- Poison Waste Dungeon

Notable non-combat activities:

- Ardougne Market Thieving
- Ardougne Rooftop Agility Course
- Barbarian Fishing
- Barbarian Agility Training
- Catherby Fishing
- Chompy Bird Hunting
- Feldip Hills Hunter Training
- Fishing Trawler
- Gnome Stronghold Agility Training
- Fishing Guild
- Myths' Guild (if the Fremennik Province is unlocked)
- Piscatoris Hunter Training Grounds
- Ourania and Wrath Altars
- Seers' Village Rooftop Agility Course
- Spirit Tree Access
- Tower of Life
- Yanille House Portal

All Slayer Masters will assign Tasks from the same Slayer list and assign the same number of Slayer Points on Task completion.

Slayer Tasks will still respect Slayer and Combat Level requirements.

Elemental Shields have been added to all Slayer Equipment shops.

Unlocking Kandarin will add the following Tasks to your Slayer list:

- Black Demons
- Cave Kraken
- Chaos Druids
- Mithril Dragons
- Ogres
- Smoke Devils
- Bloodvelds', '1014': 'The following quests and their pre-reqs are automatically completed but will not reward any completion XP:

- Monkey Madness II
- Swan Song
- King's Ransom

The following tasks in the Kandarin Achievement Diary are automatically completed:

Medium Tasks:
- Use the Grapple Shortcut to get from the Water Obelisk to Catherby beach

Hard Tasks:
- Charge a water orb
- Kill a shadow hound in the Shadow Dungeon

Elite Tasks:
- Fish and cook 5 sharks in Catherby using the Cooking Gauntlets
- Teleport to Catherby
- Mix a Stamina Mix on top of the Seers' Village Bank.

The following tasks in the Western Provinces Achievement Diary are automatically completed:

Easy Tasks:
- Complete a novice game of Pest Control
- Teleport to Pest Control using the minigame teleports

Medium Tasks:
- Complete an intermediate game of Pest Control

Hard Tasks:
- Complete a veteran game of Pest Control
- Place an Isafdar painting in your Player Owned House Quest Hall

Elite Tasks:
- Equip any complete Void set

The following tasks in the Ardougne Achievement Diary are automatically completed:

Easy Tasks:
- Enter the combat training camp north of West Ardougne
- Use the Ardougne lever to teleport to the Wilderness

Medium Tasks:
- Travel to Castle Wars by hot air balloon
- Claim buckets of sand from Bert in Yanille
- Equip an Iban's Upgraded Staff or upgrade an Iban's Staff

Hard Tasks:
- Recharge some jewellery at the totem pole in the Legends' Guild
- Smith a dragon square shield in West Ardougne
- Craft some Death Runes at the Death Altar

Elite Tasks:
- Imbue a Salve Amulet at Nightmare Zone or equip a Salve Amulet(i)
- Cast Ice Barrage on another player within Castle Wars

The following bars will be automatically completed on Alfred Grimhand's Barcrawl:

- The Rising Sun in Falador
- The Rusty Anchor in Port Sarim', '1015': 'The drops listed below are affected by the drop rate modifier perks granted by passive Relic unlocks.

Drop rates affected are always rounded down and are not tied to area unlocks. This list represents the key drops affected in Kandarin.

- Angler's Outfit from Fishing Trawler
- Zenyte Shards and Ballista components from Glough's Experiments
- Monkey Tails from Maniacal Monkey Hunting
- Trident of the Seas and Kraken Tentacles from all sources
- Occult Necklaces from all sources
- Smoke Battlestaves from all sources
- Dragon Chainbodies from all sources
- Dragon Full Helmets from all sources
- Warped Sceptre from Warped Creatures
- All unique drops from Superior Slayer Creatures'}
1714(1) {'1012': 'The Asgarnia area covers the entire Kingdom of Asgarnia along with the island of Entrana, the Pest Control islands, and Troll Country.

Instances of areas in Asgarnia and underground areas with an entrance in Asgarnia will also be included.

Access to Catherby from White Wolf Mountain will be restricted and prevented through the use of magical barriers.

All transportation and teleportation via Charter Ships, Customs Officers, Gnome Gliders, Fairy Rings, Balloons and all other forms of transport will require you to have unlocked access to the area your destination is in.

The following travel options are restricted unless you have access to the appropriate area:

- The under-wall shortcut between Port Sarim and Draynor Village
- The rubble shortcut between Death Plateau and the Fremennik Province
- The cave between Trollweiss and Keldagrim
- The rock-climb shortcut between the Troll Stronghold and the Wilderness
- The rock-climb shortcut between the God Wars Dungeon and the Wilderness
- The ladder between Taverley Dungeon and the Water Obelisk
- The underground tunnel between Taverley and Catherby
- The cave between Entrana and the Wilderness', '1013': 'Notable Settlements:

- Burthorpe
- Ruins of Camdozaal
- Ice Mountain
- Dwarven Mine
- Entrana
- Falador
- Goblin Village
- God Wars Dungeon
- Port Sarim
- Rimmington
- Taverley
- Troll Stronghold
- Void Knights' Outpost

Notable combat-related activities:

- Asgarnia Ice Dungeon
- The Whisperer (with the Kharidian Desert unlocked)
- Cerberus
- Giant Mole
- God Wars Dungeon (with Nex)
- Taverley Dungeon
- Warriors Guild

Notable non-combat activities:

- Crafting Guild
- Falador Rooftop Agility Course
- Falador Tree Patch
- Falador Allotment Patch
- Fire and Water Obelisks (with Kandarin unlocked)
- Heroes' Guild
- Motherlode Mine
- Rimmington House Portal
- Rogue's Den
- Mahogany Homes
- Mining Guild
- Air, Body, Law and Mind Altars
- Taverley House Portal
- Taverley Tree Patch
- Troll Stronghold Herb Patch

The following bosses will have the option to be fought in a private area without other players:

- Giant Mole
- God Wars Dungeon Bosses

All Slayer Masters will assign tasks from the same Slayer list and assign the same number of Slayer Points on task completion.

Slayer Tasks will still respect Slayer and Combat Level requirements.

Elemental Shields have been added to all Slayer Equipment shops.

Unlocking Asgarnia will add the following Tasks to your Slayer list:

- Black Dragons
- Blue Dragons
- Hellhounds
- Skeletal Wyverns
- Spiritual Creatures
- Trolls
- Sourhogs (after completing A Porcine of Interest)', '1014': 'The following quests and their pre-reqs are automatically completed but will not reward any completion XP:

- Merlin's Crystal
- My Arm's Big Adventure

The following tasks in the Falador Achievement Diary are automatically completed:

Medium Tasks:
- Visit the Port Sarim Rat Pits

Hard Tasks:
- Recharge your Prayer in Port Sarim church while wearing full Proselyte

Elite Tasks:
- Purchase a white 2-handed sword from Sir Vyvin

Additionally, you will be eligible to complete The Frozen Door, if you haven't already. It will not be auto-completed.', '1015': 'The drops listed below are affected by the drop rate modifier perks granted by passive Relic unlocks.

Drop rates affected are always rounded down and are not tied to area unlocks. This list represents the key drops affected in Asgarnia.

- All Defenders from Cyclops
- All crystal drops from Cerberus
- All unique drops from Kree'arra
- All unique drops from General Graardor
- All unique drops from Commander Zilyana
- All unique drops from Kril Tsu'tsaroth
- Dragon Boots from spiritual mages
- All unique drops from Nex
- All unique drops from The Whisperer
- All unique drops from Superior Slayer Creatures'}
1715(1) {'1012': 'The Fremennik Province area covers the entire Fremennik Province (including the Fremennik Isles) along with Lunar Isle and Weiss.

Instances of areas in the Fremennik Province and underground areas with an entrance in the Fremennik Province will also be included.

Access to Kandarin via the bridge south of Rellekka will be blocked by magical barriers.

All transportation and teleportation via Charter Ships, Customs Officers, Gnome Gliders, Fairy Rings, Balloons and all other forms of transport will require you to have unlocked access to the area your destination is in.

The following travel options are restricted unless you have access to the appropriate area:

- The log shortcut leading to the Fremennik Province north of Sinclair Manor
- The rubble separating the Fremennik Province and the Death Plateau
- The Cave entrance in the tunnel leading to Keldagrim that leads to the bottom of Trollweiss mountain
- The basalt rock Agility shortcut leading from the Lighthouse to the Barbarian Outpost', '1013': 'Notable Settlements:

- Keldagrim
- Ghorrock Dungeon
- Lunar Isle
- Miscellania and Etceteria
- Neitiznot and Jatizso
- Rellekka
- The Island of Stone
- The Mountain Camp
- The Pirates' Cove
- Ungael
- Waterbirth Island
- Weiss
- Weiss Herb Patch

Notable combat-related activities:

- Basilisk Knights
- Duke Sucellus (with the Kharidian Desert unlocked)
- The Phantom Muspah
- Dagannoth Kings
- Rellekka Slayer Cave
- Waterbirth Island Dungeon
- Vorkath

Notable non-combat activities:

- Blast Furnace (operated by dwarves)
- Kingdom Management
- Penguin Agility Course
- Rellekka House Portal
- Rellekka Rooftop Agility Course
- Astral Altar

The following bosses will have the option to be fought in a private area without other players:

- Dagannoth Kings

All Slayer Masters will assign tasks from the same Slayer list and assign the same number of Slayer Points on Task completion.

Slayer Tasks will still respect Slayer and Combat Level requirements.

Elemental Shields have been added to all Slayer Equipment shops.

Unlocking the Fremennik Province will add the following Tasks to your Slayer list:

- Basilisks
- Cockatrice
- Dagannoth
- Jellies
- Kurasks
- Turoth

Ice Gloves will be provided upon unlocking this area and can be reclaimed from the Sage in Lumbridge if lost.', '1014': 'The following quests and their pre-reqs are automatically completed but will not reward any completion XP:

- Secrets of the North (This does not complete Desert Treasure I)
- Horror from the Deep
- Dragon Slayer II
- Mountain Daughter

The following tasks in the Fremennik Diary are automatically completed:

Easy Tasks:
- Enter the Troll Stronghold

Medium Tasks:
- Mine some gold at the Arzinian Mine
- Travel to the Snowy Hunter Area via Eagle

Hard Tasks:
- Teleport to Trollheim

Elite Tasks:
- Kill the generals of Armadyl, Bandos, Saradomin and Zamorak in the God Wars Dungeon
- Slay a spiritual mage in the God Wars Dungeon', '1015': 'The drops listed below are affected by the drop rate modifier perks granted by passive Relic unlocks.

Drop rates affected are always rounded down and are not tied to area unlocks. This list represents the key drops affected in the Fremennik Province.

- Skeletal Visages from Vorkath
- Draconic Visages from all sources
- Dragonbone Necklaces from Vorkath
- Seers' Rings from Dagannoth Prime
- Mud Battlestaves from Dagannoth Prime
- Archer Rings from Dagannoth Supreme
- Seercull Bows from Dagannoth Supreme
- Warrior Rings from Dagannoth Rex
- Berserker Rings from Dagannoth Rex
- Dragon Axes from all sources
- Basilisk Jaws from Basilisk Knights
- Leaf-bladed Swords from all sources
- Leaf-bladed Battleaxes from Kurasks
- Brine Sabre from Brine Rats
- All unique drops from Duke Sucellus
- All unique drops from The Phantom Muspah
- All unique drops from Superior Slayer Creatures'}
1716(1) {'1012': 'The Tirannwn area covers the entirety of Tirannwn along with the Temple of Light and the Underground Pass.

Instances of areas in Tirannwn and underground areas with an entrance in Tirannwn will also be included.

All transportation and teleportation via Charter Ships, Customs Officers, Gnome Gliders, Fairy Rings, Balloons and other forms of transport will require you to have unlocked access to the area your destination is in.

The following travel options are restricted unless you have access to the appropriate area:

- The gate in Arandar leading to Kandarin
- The entrance to the Mourner Headquarters near the Temple of Light
- The Underground Pass exit leading to West Ardougne', '1013': 'Notable Settlements:

- Gwenith
- Iorwerth Camp
- Lletya
- Prifddinas
- Tyras Camp
- Zul-Andra

Notable combat-related activities:

- A 'Rabbit'
- Iorwerth Slayer Dungeon
- The Gauntlet
- Zulrah

Notable non-combat activities:

- Enhanced Crystal Chest
- The Death Altar
- Lletya Fruit Tree Patch
- Prifddinas Allotment Patch
- Prifddinas Agility Course
- Prifddinas Crystal Implings
- Prifddinas Hunting Grounds
- Prifddinas House Portal
- Prifddinas Hardwood Trees
- Sacred Eel Fishing
- Zalcano

All Slayer Masters will assign Tasks from the same Slayer list and assign the same number of Slayer Points on Task completion.

Slayer Tasks will still respect Slayer and Combat Level requirements.

Elemental Shields have been added to all Slayer Equipment shops.

Unlocking Tirannwn will add the following tasks to your Slayer list:

- Bloodveld
- Dark Beasts
- Elves
- Kurask
- Nechryaels
- Waterfiends', '1014': 'The following quests and their pre-reqs are automatically completed but will not reward any completion XP:

- Song of the Elves', '1015': 'The drops listed below are affected by the drop rate modifier perks granted by passive Relic unlocks.

Drop rates affected are always rounded down and are not tied to area unlocks. This list represents the key drops affected in Tirannwn.

Group content like Zalcano will determine the drop rate modifier for their uniques from the MVP of that particular kill/completion.

- Elven Signet from Crystal Implings
- Crystal Armour Seeds from The Gauntlet
- Crystal Weapon Seeds from The Gauntlet
- Enhanced Crystal Weapon Seeds from The Gauntlet
- Crystal Tool Seeds from Zalcano
- Zalcano Shards from Zalcano
- Tanzanite Fangs from Zulrah
- Magic Fangs from Zulrah
- Serpentine Visages from Zulrah
- Onyxes from Zulrah
- Dark Bows from Dark Beasts
- Dragonstone Armour from the Enhanced Crystal Chest
- Enhanced Crystal Teleport Seeds from all sources
- Mist Battlestaves from Waterfiends
- Leaf-bladed Battleaxes and Swords from Kurasks
- All unique drops from Superior Slayer Creatures'}
1717(1) {'1012': 'The Morytania area covers the entirety of Morytania along with the island of Mos Le'Harmless, Braindeath Island, Dragontooth Island and Harmony Island.

Instances of areas in Morytania and underground areas with an entrance in Morytania will also be included.

All transportation and teleportation via Charter Ships, Customs Officers, Gnome Gliders, Fairy Rings, Balloons and other forms of transport will require you to have unlocked access to the area your destination is in.

The following travel options are restricted unless you have access to the appropriate area:

- The Agility shortcut through the railing next to the Paterdomus Temple leading to Misthalin
- The stairs leading from the Paterdomus Temple up to Misthalin', '1013': 'Notable Settlements:

- Burgh de Rott
- Mos Le'Harmless
- Canifis
- Darkmeyer
- Meiyerditch
- Mort'ton
- Port Phasmatys
- Slepe
- Ver Sinhaza

Notable combat-related activities:

- Barrows
- Cave Horrors
- Fenkenstrain's Experiments
- Grotesque Guardians
- Haunted Mines
- Nightmare of Ashihama
- Lair of Tarn Razorlor
- Shades of Mort'ton
- Slayer Tower
- Theatre of Blood
- Vyrewatch Sentinels

Notable non-combat activities:

- Canifis Rooftop Agility Course
- Daeyalt Essence Mining
- Ectofuntus Prayer Training
- The True Blood Altar
- Hallowed Sepulchre
- Harmony Island Herb Patch
- Port Phasmatys Allotment Patch
- Temple Trekking
- Vyre Pickpocketing
- Werewolf Agility Course

All Slayer Masters will assign Tasks from the same Slayer list and assign the same number of Slayer Points on Task completion.

Slayer Tasks will still respect Slayer and Combat Level requirements.

Elemental Shields have been added to all Slayer Equipment shops.

Unlocking Morytania will add the following Tasks to your Slayer list:

- Banshees
- Bloodveld
- Cave Horrors
- Gargoyles
- Nechryaels
- Vampyres', '1014': 'The following quests and their pre-reqs are automatically completed but will not reward any completion XP:

- Darkness of Hallowvale
- The Great Brain Robbery

The following tasks in the Morytania Achievement Diary are automatically completed:

Medium Tasks:
- Make a batch of Cannonballs at the Port Phasmatys furnace

Hard Tasks:
- Enter the Kharyrll portal in your Player Owned House through a Portal Chamber
- Pray at the Altar of Nature in the Nature Grotto with Piety activated

Elite Tasks:
- Catch a shark in Burgh de Rott with your bare hands
- Fertilize the Morytania herb patch using Lunar spells', '1015': 'Theatre of Blood: Hard mode and Phosanis nightmare has had the following changes in this League to really put you and your relics to the test:

- Increased Damage taken by 25%
- 25% increased defence on monsters
- 50% increased hitpoints on monsters
- Unique chance will be multiplied by 3 (E.g Leagues unique multiplier x5 turns into x15).

The drops listed below are affected by the drop rate modifier perks granted by passive Relic unlocks.

Drop rates affected are always rounded down and are not tied to area unlocks. This list represents the key drops affected in Morytania.

Group content like The Nightmare and Theatre of Blood will determine the drop rate modifier for their uniques from the MVP of that particular kill/completion.

- Black masks from Cave horrors.
- Barrows armour and weapon pieces from The Barrows
- Granite Gloves from Grotesque Guardians
- Granite Hammers from Grotesque Guardians
- Granite Rings from Grotesque Guardians
- Dark Tourmaline Cores from Grotesque Guardians
- Rings of Endurance (uncharged) from The Hallowed Sepulchre
- Blood Shards from Vyres.
- All unique rewards from the Theatre of Blood
- All unique rewards from The Nightmare
- All unique drops from Superior Slayer Creatures
- Zealot Robes from Shades of Morton
- Runescrolls from Shades of Morton
Granite Maul from Gargoyles
- Brittle Key from Gargoyles'}
1718(1) {'1012': 'The Kharidian Desert area covers the entirety of the Kharidian Desert.

The Emir's Arena minigame will not be available during this League, although the building itself is accessible.

Instances of areas in the Kharidian Desert and underground areas with an entrance in the Kharidian Desert will also be included.


All transportation and teleportation via Charter Ships, Customs Officers, Gnome Gliders, Fairy Rings, Balloons or any other form of transport will require you to have unlocked access to the area your destination is in.
', '1013': 'Notable Settlements:

- Bandit Camp
- Necropolis
- Ruins of Unkah
- Bedabin Camp
- Desert Mining Camp
- Nardah
- Pollnivneach
- Ruins of Uzer
- Uzer Oasis
- Giants' Plateau
- Sophanem

Notable combat-related activities:

- Bandits
- Kalphite Queen
- Pollnivneach Slayer Dungeon
- Tombs of Amascut
- The Leviathan
- Tempoross

Notable non-combat activities:

- Agility Pyramid
- Mage Training Arena
- Giants Foundry
- Guardians of the Rift
- Nardah Elidinis Statuette
- Pollnivneach blackjacking
- Pollnivneach House Portal
- Pollnivneach Rooftop Agility Course
- Pyramid Plunder
- Fire Altar
- Sandstone and Granite Mining
- Sandstorm Machine
- Sorceress' Garden
- Zahur's Herblore Services

The following bosses will have the option to be fought in a private area without other players:

- Kalphite Queen

All Slayer Masters will assign Tasks from the same Slayer list and assign the same number of Slayer Points on Task completion.

Slayer Tasks will still respect Slayer and Combat Level requirements.

Elemental Shields have been added to all Slayer Equipment shops.

Unlocking the Kharidian Desert will add the following tasks to your Slayer list:

- Bandits
- Dust Devils
- Kalphites
- Lizards
- Pyrefiends
- Scabarites (after completing Contact!)', '1014': 'The following quests and their pre-reqs are automatically completed but will not reward any completion XP:

- Desert Treasure II

The following tasks in the Desert Achievement Diary are automatically completed:

Medium Tasks:
- Travel to the Desert via the Eagle transport system

Hard Tasks:
- Slay a dust devil in the desert cave with a Slayer Helmet equipped
- Refill your Waterskins in the Desert using Lunar spells

Elite Tasks:
- Bake a wild pie at the Nardah clay oven
- Speak to the Kalquite Queen Head in your Player Owned House

The above Kalquite Queen Head diary task will complete when you receive a Kalphite Queen Head or Kalphite Queen Head(tattered) drop instead.', '1015': 'Tombs of Amascut has 2 new invocations, meaning max raid level will go up to 1000, without the diminishing returns on unique chance.

The drops listed below are affected by the drop rate modifier perks granted by passive Relic unlocks.

Drop rates affected are always rounded down and are not tied to area unlocks. This list represents the key drops affected in The Desert.

- The Pharaoh's Sceptre from Pyramid Plunder
- Dragon Chainbodies from all sources
- Dragon 2-handed Swords from all sources
- Dust Battlestaves from Dust Devils
- All unique drops from Superior Slayer Creatures
- All unique items from Tombs of Amascut
- All unique drops from The Leviathan
- All unique items from Tempoross
- All unique items from Guardians of the Rift

- All Desert Treasure II bosses will drop all pieces of the Soulreaper Axe
- Dragon pickaxe from all sources'}
1719(1) {'1012': 'The Wilderness area covers the entirety of the Wilderness.

Last Man Standing and Bounty Hunter will not be accessible during this League.

For this League, deaths will behave differently in the Wilderness:

- PvP deaths will be treated like a PvM death with your lost items moving to a gravestone. The gravestone will then move to your respawn location.
- PvM deaths will be unaffected.
- Loot keys are disabled on League Worlds.

Instances of areas in the Wilderness and underground areas with an entrance in the Wilderness will also be included.

All transportation and teleportation via Charter Ships, Customs Officers, Gnome Gliders, Fairy Rings, Balloons and other forms of transport require you to have unlocked access to the area your destination is in.

The following travel options are restricted unless you have access to the appropriate area:

- Crossing the Wilderness Ditch will require access to whichever area is on the other side of it
- The lever at the Deserted Keep will work only if you have access to the area it takes you to', '1013': 'Notable Settlements:

- Bandit Camp
- Dark Warriors' Fortress
- Ferox Enclave
- The Mage Arena
- Rogues' Castle
- The Pirates' Hideout

Notable combat-related activities:

- Callisto and Artio
- Chaos Elemental
- Chaos Fanatic
- Corporeal Beast
- Crazy Archaeologist
- Forthinry Dungeon
- King Black Dragon
- Lava Dragons
- Mage Arena
- Mage Arena II
- Scorpia
- Venenatis and Spindel
- Vet'ion and Calvar'ion
- Wilderness God Wars Dungeon
- Wilderness Slayer Tasks

Notable non-combat activities:

- Abyss Runecrafting
- Altar access is restricted to their areas
- Air Obelisk
- Black Chinchompas
- Black Salamanders
- Dark Crab Fishing
- Earth Obelisk
- Fountain of Rune
- Chaos Altar
- Wilderness Agility Course
- Wilderness Resource Area

Access to the Revenant Caves will be free instead of requiring 100, 000 coins to enter.

All Slayer Masters will assign Tasks from the same Slayer list and assign the same number of Slayer Points on Task completion.

Slayer Tasks will still respect Slayer and Combat Level requirements.

Elemental Shields have been added to all Slayer Equipment shops.

Krystillia assigns tasks like any other Slayer Master, not assigning Wilderness-specific tasks.

Slayer targets defeated within the Wilderness will have a chance to drop a Larran's Key.

Unlocking the Wilderness will add the following tasks to your Slayer list:

- Bears
- Nechryaels
- Dust Devils
- Lava Dragons
- Revenants
- Skeletons', '1014': 'The following quest is automatically completed but will not award any completion XP:

- Enter the Abyss

The following tasks in the Wilderness Achievement Diary are automatically completed:

Medium Tasks:
- Smith a Gold Helmet in the resource area

Hard Tasks:
- Take the Agility shortcut from Trollheim to the Wilderness
- Fish a raw lava eel in the Wilderness
- Teleport to Ghorrock', '1015': 'The drops listed below are affected by the drop rate modifier perks granted by passive Relic unlocks.

Drop rates affected are always rounded down and are not tied to area unlocks. This list represents the key drops affected in the Wilderness.

- All unique rewards from Revenants
- Malediction and Odium shards from all sources
- Fedoras from the Crazy Archaeologist
- Dragon Boots from spiritual mages
- Dragon 2-handed Swords from all sources
- Dragon Pickaxes from all sources
- All unique rewards from Venenatis
- All unique rewards from Callisto
- All unique rewards from Vet'ion
- Draconic Visages from all sources
- Amulets of Eternal Glory from the Fountain of Rune
- Dagon'hai robes from Larran's Big Chest
- All unique rewards from the Corporeal Beast
- All unique drops from Superior Slayer Creatures'}
1740(1) {'1020': 'Your run energy will never drain whilst running.'}
1741(1) {'1020': 'Your League XP multiplier increases from 5x to 8x.'}
1742(1) {'1020': 'Items from some sources will be 2x as common.'}
1743(1) {'1020': 'Your League XP multiplier increases from 8x to 12x.'}
1744(1) {'1020': 'Items from some sources will be 3x as common.'}
1745(1) {'1020': 'Your League XP multiplier increases from 12x to 16x.'}

4698(1) {'1012': 'The Kebos and Kourend area covers the entirety of Kebos and Kourend.

Instances of areas in Kebos and Kourend and underground areas with an entrance in Kebos and Kourend will also be included.

All transportation and teleportation via Charter Ships, Customs Officers, Gnome Gliders, Fairy Rings, Balloons and all other forms of transport will require you to have unlocked access to the area your destination is in.

', '1013': 'Notable Settlements:

- Hosidius
- Arceuus
- Lovakengj
- Port Piscarilius
- Shayzien
- Kingstown
- Northern Tundras
- Kourend Woodland
- Mount Karuulm
- Kebos Swamp
- Mount Quidamortem
- The Stranglewood

Notable combat-related activities:

- Chambers of Xeric
- Vardorvis (With the Kharidian Desert unlocked)
- Lizardman Shaman
- Mount Karuulm Slayer Dungeon
- Sarachnis (Forthos Dungeon)
- Catacombs of Kourend
- Giants' Den

Notable non-combat activities:

- Farming Guild
- Woodcutting Guild
-Arceuus Library
- Hosidius House Portal
- Tithe Farm
- Lake Molch Aerial Fishing
- The Wintertodt
- Soul and Blood Altar
- Blast Mine

Konar will assign Slayer Tasks based on the areas you have unlocked.

Slayer Tasks will still respect Slayer and Combat Level requirements.

Elemental Shields have been added to all Slayer Equipment shops.
Unlocking Kourend will add the following Tasks to your Slayer list:

- Lizardmen
- Red Dragons
- Wyrms
- Drakes
- Hydras
- Bloodvelds', '1014': 'The following quest is automatically completed but will not award any completion XP:

- X Marks the Spot

The following tasks in the Kourend and Kebos Achievement Diary are automatically completed:

Hard Tasks:
- Cast Monster Examine on a mountain troll south of Mount Quidamortem.', '1015': 'Chambers of Xeric: Challenge mode has had the following changes in this League to really put you and your relics to the test:

- Increased Damage taken by 25%
- 25% increased defence on monsters
- 50% increased hitpoints on monsters
- Unique chance will be multiplied by 3 (E.g Leagues unique multiplier x5 turns into x15).

-The drops listed below are affected by the drop rate modifier perks granted by passive Relic unlocks.

Drop rates affected are always rounded down and are not tied to area unlocks. This list represents the key drops affected in Kebos and Kourend.

- Unique items from Chambers of Xeric
- Unique items from Vardorvis
- Unique items from Wintertodt
- Dragon Thrownaxe and Dragon Knife from Drakes, Hydras and Wyrms
- Hydra's Claw, Hydra's Leather, Hydra's Eye, Hydra's Heart, Hydra's Fang and Hydra Tail from Hydras
- Drake's Tooth and Drake's Claw from Drakes
- Dragon Sword and Dragon Harpoon from Wyrms
- Dragon Warhammer from lizardman shamans
- Draconic Visage from dragons in the Catacombs of Kourend
- Sarachnis Cudgel from Sarachnis
- Bottomless Compost Bucket from Hespori
- Dusk Mystic and Dragon Hasta from the Brimstone Chest'}
4732(1) {'1020': 'TODO TIER 7 effects.'}
4733(1) {'1020': '- Items from some sources will be 2x as common.

- Your run energy will never drain whilst running.

- All clues will drop as scroll boxes.

- You will only receive clues you can complete within your chosen areas.'}
4734(1) {'1020': '- Your League XP multiplier increases from 5x to 8x.

- Minigame points received are boosted by 3x.'}
4735(1) {'1020': '- Obtain the Crystal of Memories, which when used will teleport you back to the location from where your most recent teleport occurred.

- Only works if the item is in your inventory and you will receive a message in your chatbox if it successfully stored your previous destination.

- The item will not remember your teleport location if you teleport from an instance, except certain boss instances (listed at the bottom), as well as quest areas, minigames, etc.

- You cannot teleport using the item whilst you have a follower.

- As this passive gives you an item it must be unlocked at a bank.

- This item has a base cooldown of 6 minutes, this cooldown is reduced by 1 minute for every 300 total levels you have, e.g at 1800 there is no cooldown.

Boss Instances:
- God wars bosses
- Kalphite Queen
- Skotizo
- Kraken
- Corporeal Beast
- Obor
- Vorkath
- Alchemical Hydra
- Hespori
- The Mimic
- Bryophyta
- Grotesque Guardians
- Zulrah'}
4736(1) {'1020': '- Items from some sources will be 3x as common.

- The \'Bigger and badder\' slayer unlock is unlocked for free, points are refunded if already unlocked.

- Slayer points are x5 from tasks and aren't limited to a minimum of 10 tasks, e.g points from task 1.

- Slayer Superior rates are increased to a 1/50 chance to appear.'}
4737(1) {'1020': '- Your League XP multiplier increases from 8x to 12x.

- Minigame points received are boosted by 5x.'}
4738(1) {'1020': 'Items from some sources will be 4x as common.'}
4739(1) {'1020': '- Your League XP multiplier increases from 12x to 16x.

- Minigame points received are boosted by 8x.'}
4740(1) {'1020': 'Items from some sources will be 5x as common.'}
