params {'87': 3354, '149': 2306, '858': 'Leagues II - Trailblazer', '864': 52792461, '865': 5, '866': 3359, '867': 3361, '868': 5196, '869': 5197, '870': 3362, '871': 6818, '872': 6888, '888': 3371, '889': 3372, '890': 3377, '891': 3378, '892': 3373, '893': 3374, '894': 3375, '895': 3376, '896': 5, '1021': 1835, '1022': 2690, '1023': 2691, '1024': 2718, '1025': 2719, '1026': 2594, '1027': 14733725, '1028': 15787191, '1029': 0, '1030': 0, '1031': 2720, '1032': 496, '1033': 747, '1039': 15, '1040': 75, '1041': 225, '1143': 2691, '1144': 2690, '1145': 3585, '1146': 3586} {'87': 3354, '149': 2306, '858': 'Leagues II - Trailblazer', '864': 52776080, '865': 5, '866': 3359, '867': 3361, '868': 5196, '869': 5197, '870': 5702, '871': 6818, '872': 6888, '888': 3371, '889': 3372, '890': 3377, '891': 3378, '892': 3373, '896': 5, '1021': 1835, '1022': 2690, '1023': 2691, '1024': 2718, '1025': 2719, '1026': 2594, '1027': 14733725, '1028': 15787191, '1029': 0, '1030': 0, '1031': 2720, '1032': 496, '1033': 747, '1039': 15, '1040': 75, '1041': 225, '1143': 2691, '1144': 2690, '1145': 3585, '1146': 3586, '2041': -1, '2050': '<col=FF7700>', '2051': '<col=A34C00>', '2053': 1}
1723(1)
params {'879': 'Production Prodigy', '880': '- When doing the following activities, all items are processed at once:

- Smelting ores, Smithing bars (does not work with the Superheat item spell) and making Cannonballs.

- Fletching logs, stringing Bows and cutting bolt tips.

- Cleaning herbs and making Potions which do not have a stackable secondary ingredient.

- Cooking food and making Jugs of Wine.

- Crafting leather, uncut gems, glassblowing, jewellery, pottery, Battlestaves and spinning flax or wool.

- Full XP is given for items processed using this Relic.

- There is a 25% chance that you will make an extra product, which will be sent to your Bank if you have space. The additional product will also grant XP.

- Additionally Crafting, Smithing, Herblore, Fletching and Cooking are boosted by +12.', '881': 5310, '882': 5419, '883': 5337, '884': 5283, '885': 0, '1274': 3060, '1853': 5364, '1854': 5392}		 {'879': 'Production Master', '880': 'When doing the following <col=ffffff>Production</col> activities, all items are processed at once:

- smelting ores, Smithing bars and making Cannonballs.

- Fletching logs, stringing Bows, making arrow shafts and cutting bolt tips.

- Making headless arrows, regular arrows, bolts and darts (capped at 10x the regular amount per action).

- Cleaning herbs and making potions which do not have a stackable secondary ingredient.

- Cooking food, making pies or pizzas and making Jugs of Wine.

- Crafting leather, uncut gems, glassblowing, jewellery, pottery, Battlestaves and spinning flax or wool.', '881': 6001, '882': 6110, '883': 6028, '884': 5974, '885': 4, '1853': 6055, '1854': 6083, '1855': 0}
1725(1)
params {'879': 'Fairy's Flight', '880': '- Upon selecting this Relic you will receive a Fairy Mushroom which can be used to teleport you to any Fairy Ring, Spirit Tree or Tool Leprechaun.

- The Fairy Mushroom cannot be used to teleport to an area you haven't unlocked.

- The Fairy Mushroom can be equipped in your shield slot.

- As this Relic gives you an item it must be unlocked at a Bank.', '881': 5312, '882': 5421, '883': 5339, '884': 5285, '885': 1, '1274': 3062, '1853': 5366, '1854': 5394, '1855': 1}		 {'879': 'Fairy's Flight', '880': '- This item will allow you to <col=ffffff>Teleport</col> to any fairy ring, spirit tree, or tool leprechaun.

- Unlocking this Relic will autocomplete the Tree Gnome Village quest.

- This item ignores wilderness teleport restrictions.

- This item cannot be used to teleport to an area you haven't unlocked.', '881': 5991, '882': 6100, '883': 6018, '884': 5964, '885': 2, '1274': 3062, '1853': 6045, '1854': 6073, '1855': 1, '2049': 25102}
1727(1)
params {'879': 'Last Recall', '880': '- Upon selecting this Relic you will receive a Crystal of Memories which when used will teleport you back to the location from where your most recent teleport occurred.

- Your teleport will only be stored if the Crystal of Memories is in your Inventory. You will receive a message in your chatbox if it successfully stored your previous destination.

- The Crystal of Memories will not remember your teleport location if you teleport from an instance.

- There are various other locations this teleport won't save your teleport location, including quest areas, minigames, etc.

- You cannot teleport using the Crystal of Memories whilst you have a follower.

- On death, the Crystal of Memories is destroyed and can be reclaimed from the Sage in Lumbridge.

- As this Relic gives you an item it must be unlocked at a Bank.', '881': 2662, '883': 2663, '884': 2614, '885': 1, '1274': 3064, '1855': 1}		 {'879': 'Last Recall', '880': '- Upon selecting this Relic you will receive a Crystal of Memories which when used will teleport you back to the location from where your most recent teleport occurred.

- Your teleport will only be stored if the Crystal of Memories is in your Inventory. You will receive a message in your chatbox if it successfully stored your previous destination.

- The Crystal of Memories will not remember your teleport location if you teleport from an instance.

- There are various other locations this teleport won't save your teleport location, including quest areas, minigames, etc.

- You cannot teleport using the Crystal of Memories whilst you have a follower.

- On death, the Crystal of Memories is destroyed and can be reclaimed from the Sage in Lumbridge.

- As this Relic gives you an item it must be unlocked at a Bank.', '881': 2662, '883': 2663, '884': 2614, '885': 1, '1274': 3064, '1855': 1, '2049': 25104}
1731(1)
params {'879': 'Second Inventory', '880': '- Upon selecting this Relic you will receive an Extradimensional Bag which will act as a second Inventory with 28 slots.

- The Extradimensional Bag can be withdrawn from and deposited into from anywhere.

- The Extradimensional Bag can be opened so that items picked up from the ground will automatically go into it.

- Items can be withdrawn from a Bank directly into the Extradimensional Bag.

- Items cannot be used from within the Extradimensional Bag - they must still be in your Inventory.

- Existing storage items such as a Looting Bags, Herb Sacks and Rune Pouches cannot be stored inside the Extradimensional Bag.

- The Extradimensional Bag can be equipped in your cape slot.

- On death, the Extradimensional Bag is destroyed and can be reclaimed from the Sage in Lumbridge. The contents of the Extradimensional Bag are not destroyed when this happens.

- As this Relic gives you an item it must be unlocked at a Bank.', '881': 2670, '883': 2671, '884': 2622, '885': 3, '1274': 3068, '1855': 1}		 {'879': 'Second Inventory', '880': '- Upon selecting this Relic you will receive an Extradimensional Bag which will act as a second Inventory with 28 slots.

- The Extradimensional Bag can be withdrawn from and deposited into from anywhere.

- The Extradimensional Bag can be opened so that items picked up from the ground will automatically go into it.

- Items can be withdrawn from a Bank directly into the Extradimensional Bag.

- Items cannot be used from within the Extradimensional Bag - they must still be in your Inventory.

- Existing storage items such as a Looting Bags, Herb Sacks and Rune Pouches cannot be stored inside the Extradimensional Bag.

- On death, the Extradimensional Bag is destroyed and can be reclaimed from the Sage in Lumbridge. The contents of the Extradimensional Bag are not destroyed when this happens.

- As this Relic gives you an item it must be unlocked at a Bank.', '881': 2670, '883': 2671, '884': 2622, '885': 3, '1274': 3068, '1855': 1}
1736(1)
params {'879': 'Equilibrium', '880': '- Each time you gain XP, you gain additional XP equal to 10% of your total level.

- Additional XP given by this Relic is not multiplied by your Leagues XP multiplier.

- Your lowest skill will receive 20% total level XP instead of 10%.

Tip: If chosen with the Production Prodigy Relic, each item processed will trigger this effect.', '881': 5321, '882': 5430, '883': 5348, '884': 5294, '885': 5, '1274': 3073, '1853': 5375, '1854': 5403}		 {'879': 'Equilibrium', '880': 'You gain the following benefit to <col=ffffff>All Skills</col>:

- Each time you gain XP, you gain additional XP equal to 10% of your total level.

- Additional XP given by this Relic is not multiplied by your Leagues XP multiplier.

- Your lowest skill will receive 20% total level XP instead of 10%.

Tip: Equilibrium will trigger per instance of individual xp provided, even if that is multiple times in a single tick. E.g. Production Master will trigger Equilibrium one time per item processed.', '881': 5999, '882': 6108, '883': 6026, '884': 5972, '885': 3, '1274': 3073, '1853': 6053, '1854': 6081}
1746(1)

params {'1313': 'Grotesque Guardians', '1314': 328, '1315': 26, '1317': 56118753, '1319': 'The Grotesque Guardians, Dusk and Dawn, can be found on the Slayer Tower's rooftop, through the entrance on the upper floor.

In order to unlock access to the roof, a brittle key, obtained from killing a gargoyle whilst on a gargoyle slayer task, is required.

Attack Styles - Melee, Ranged, Magic, Special
Immunities - Poison, Venom
Slayer Categories - Gargoyle', '1320': 'Mandatory requirements:
- 75 Slayer
- A gargoyle slayer task
- Access to the Slayer Tower roof

Combat Achievement task difficulty:
- Hard
- Elite
- Master
- Grandmaster', '1322': 34187, '1323': 7797, '1324': 0, '1325': 380, '1326': 66, '1327': 186, '1328': 0, '1329': 3000}		 {'1313': 'Grotesque Guardians', '1314': 328, '1315': 26, '1317': 56118753, '1319': 'The Grotesque Guardians, Dusk and Dawn, can be found on the Slayer Tower's rooftop, through the entrance on the upper floor.

In order to unlock access to the roof, a brittle key, obtained from killing a gargoyle whilst on a gargoyle slayer task, is required.

Attack Styles - Melee, Ranged, Magic, Special
Immunities - Poison, Venom
Slayer Categories - Gargoyle', '1320': 'Mandatory requirements:

params {'1313': 'Hespori', '1314': 284, '1315': 27, '1317': 20440935, '1319': 'The Hespori is a rare carnivorous plant that becomes conscious and highly aggressive once fully grown.

In order to fight it, a Hespori seed must be planted and fully grown in the Hespori patch within the west wing of the Farming Guild.

Attack Styles - Ranged, Magic
Immunities - Poison, Venom
Slayer Categories - None', '1320': 'Mandatory requirements:
- 65 Farming
- Hespori Seed

- Hard

params {'1077': 315, '1078': 0, '1086': 'Disable level-up interface', '1088': 'combat, skill, interface', '1096': 'When enabled, the level-up interface will no longer open and skill unlocks will not be shown. You will continue to get level-up fireworks, jingles, messages and broadcasts, but levelling will no longer delay or interrupt your actions.'} {'1077': 315, '1078': 0, '1086': 'Disable level-up interface', '1088': 'combat, skill, interface, levelup, level up, level', '1096': 'When enabled, the level-up interface will no longer open and skill unlocks will not be shown. You will continue to get level-up fireworks, jingles, messages and broadcasts, but levelling will no longer delay or interrupt your actions.'}
4699(1)
params {'87': 5251, '149': 2305, '858': 'Leagues IV - Trailblazer Reloaded', '864': 52792461, '865': 5, '866': 5206, '867': 5208, '868': 5239, '869': 5240, '870': 5209, '871': 7931, '872': 7987, '888': 3371, '889': 3372, '890': -1, '891': 3378, '892': 5223, '893': 5224, '894': 5225, '895': 5226, '896': 3, '1021': 2603, '1022': 5335, '1023': 5362, '1024': 5445, '1025': 5446, '1026': 5272, '1027': 16742144, '1028': 15778716, '1029': 16777215, '1030': 1, '1031': 5447, '1032': 496, '1033': 747, '1039': 15, '1040': 75, '1041': 225, '1143': 5362, '1144': 5335, '1145': 3352, '1146': 3353, '1856': 5273, '1857': 5237, '1882': 'Leagues IV'} {'87': 5251, '149': 2305, '858': 'Leagues IV - Trailblazer Reloaded', '864': 52776080, '865': 5, '866': 5206, '867': 5208, '868': 5239, '869': 5240, '870': 5702, '871': 7931, '872': 7987, '888': 5221, '889': 5222, '890': 5227, '891': 5228, '892': 5671, '896': 3, '1021': 2603, '1022': 5335, '1023': 5362, '1024': 5445, '1025': 5446, '1026': 5272, '1027': 16742144, '1028': 15778716, '1029': 16777215, '1030': 1, '1031': 5447, '1032': 496, '1033': 747, '1039': 15, '1040': 75, '1041': 225, '1143': 5362, '1144': 5335, '1145': 3352, '1146': 3353, '1856': 6301, '1857': 5237, '1882': 'Leagues IV', '2041': 5238, '2050': '<col=FF7700>', '2051': '<col=A34C00>', '2053': 1}
4719(1)
params {'879': 'Banker's Note', '880': '- You will receive the item: Banker's Note.

- This item will allow you to note and unnote items anywhere in Gielinor.

- You can manually use items on the Banker's Note to un-note or note them all, much like a Bank. Using the Banker's Note on the item will not work.

- The 'Activate' option allows you to note and un-note items in one action with a specified quantity. An object must first be used on the Banker's Note in order for this to work.

- You can customise how many items the Banker's note will note and un-note using the quantity options.

- If lost, you can reclaim the Banker's Note from the Sage near Lumbridge.

- As this Relic gives you an item it must be unlocked at a Bank.', '881': 5322, '882': 5431, '883': 5349, '884': 5295, '885': 2, '1274': 4703, '1853': 5376, '1854': 5404, '1855': 1}		 {'879': 'Banker's Note', '880': '- This item will allow you to note and unnote items anywhere in Gielinor.

- You can manually use items on the Banker's Note to unnote or note them all, much like a Bank.

- The 'Activate' option allows you to note and unnote items in one action with a specified quantity. An object must first be used on the Banker's Note in order for this to work.

- You can customise how many items the Banker's note will note and unnote using the quantity options.', '881': 6004, '882': 6113, '883': 6031, '884': 5977, '885': 5, '1274': 4703, '1853': 6058, '1854': 6086, '1855': 1, '2049': 28767}
4726(1)
params {'879': 'Executioner', '880': '- You will receive the item: Sage's Axe.

- This item can be used to execute targets below 20% hitpoints.

- The Sage's Axe has an attack range of 6 tiles.

- The Sage's Axe will respect any Ranged damage reduction a target already possesses.

- As this Relic gives you an item it must be unlocked at a Bank.', '881': 5328, '882': 5437, '883': 5355, '884': 5301, '885': 7, '1274': 4709, '1853': 5382, '1854': 5410, '1855': 1}		 {'879': 'Executioner', '880': '- You will receive the item: Sage's Axe.

- This item can be used to execute targets below 20% hitpoints.

- The Sage's Axe has an attack range of 6 tiles.

- The Sage's Axe will respect any Ranged damage reduction a target already possesses.

- As this Relic gives you an item it must be unlocked at a Bank.', '881': 5328, '882': 5437, '883': 5355, '884': 5301, '885': 7, '1274': 4709, '1853': 5382, '1854': 5410, '1855': 1, '2049': 28773}
4728(1)
params {'879': 'Guardian', '880': '- You will receive a Guardian Horn which allows you to summon a powerful guardian thrall, lasting 30 minutes.

- The guardian will attack your target with whatever style it is weak to. It will hit much higher than regular thralls and has very high accuracy.

- When you are in multi-combat areas it will attempt to cast an area of effect attack if the primary target is weak to range or magic. This multi-attack can be toggled using the relevant option on the Guardian Horn.

- Min hit: 6, Max hit: 15, Attack Speed: 5, Accuracy: 45000

- You do not need to be on the Arceuus Spellbook to use this Relic, and you can also summon regular thralls alongside the guardian.

- The guardian will not deal damage to other players. <br>
- This relic will also work inside The Gauntlet.

- As this Relic gives you an item it must be unlocked at a Bank.', '881': 5329, '882': 5438, '883': 5356, '884': 5302, '885': 7, '1274': 4711, '1853': 5383, '1854': 5411, '1855': 1}		 {'879': 'Guardian', '880': '- This item will allow you to summon a powerful <col=ffffff>Guardian Thrall</col>, lasting 30 minutes.

- The guardian will attack your target with whatever style it is weak to.

- When you are in multi-combat it will cast an AoE attack if the target is weak to range or magic.

- The Guardian's stats are:
- Min hit: 5
 - Max hit: 13
 - Attack Speed: 4
 - Accuracy: 45000

- The Guardian does not work in PvP.<br>
- This relic will also work inside The Gauntlet.', '881': 6009, '882': 6118, '883': 6036, '884': 5982, '885': 7, '1274': 4711, '1853': 6063, '1854': 6091, '1855': 1, '2049': 28769}
4730(1)
params {'879': 'Trickster', '880': '- You will automatically re-pickpocket your target.

- Loot from pickpocketing is doubled and noted.

- Coin pouch limit is multiplied by 3.

- You will be given the Sage's Greaves, that will grant Agility XP that scales with your Agility level while running.

- Box traps lure creatures faster.

- Loot from box traps is doubled.

- Impling jars cannot break.

- You can burn up to 9 logs simultaneously.

- You cannot fail actions for Thieving, Agility, Hunter and Firemaking.

- As this Relic gives you an item it must be unlocked at a Bank.', '881': 5311, '882': 5420, '883': 5338, '884': 5284, '885': 0, '1274': 4714, '1853': 5365, '1854': 5393, '1855': 1}		 {'879': 'Trickster', '880': '- You will automatically re-pickpocket your target.

- Loot from pickpocketing is doubled and noted.

- Coin pouch limit is multiplied by 3.

- You will be given the Sage's Greaves, that will grant Agility XP that scales with your Agility level while running.

- Box traps lure creatures faster.

- Loot from box traps is doubled.

- Impling jars cannot break.

- You can burn up to 9 logs simultaneously.

- You cannot fail actions for Thieving, Agility, Hunter and Firemaking.

- As this Relic gives you an item it must be unlocked at a Bank.', '881': 5311, '882': 5420, '883': 5338, '884': 5284, '885': 0, '1274': 4714, '1853': 5365, '1854': 5393, '1855': 1, '2049': 28771}
4731(1)
params {'879': 'Ruinous Powers', '880': '- You will obtain the Ruinous Powers, a powerful alternate Prayer Book, with all Prayers unlocked.

- As this Relic gives you an item it must be unlocked at a Bank.', '881': 5330, '882': 5439, '883': 5357, '884': 5303, '885': 5, '1274': 4715, '1853': 5384, '1854': 5412, '1855': 1}		 {'879': 'Ruinous Powers', '880': '- You will obtain the Ruinous Powers, a powerful alternate Prayer Book, with all Prayers unlocked.

4218 85 [[50], [30393], [30367], [25], [3568], [In the dungeons of Taverly, you will be able to fight the Raging Echo of Cerberus.

The Raging Echo of Cerberus does not require a slayer task to kill.], [2], [3], [Cerberus], [91 Slayer]]
4219 85 [[30], [30394], [30373], [20], [3559], [The Kalphite Queen resides in the Kalphite Lair south-west of the Shantay Pass.], [1], [6], [Kalphite Queen], None]
4220 85 [[30], [30395], [30376, 30378], [25, 25], [3550], [The Dagannoth Kings reside in the sixth level of the Waterbirth Island Dungeon.], [2], [8], [Dagannoth Kings], None]
4221 85 [[50], [30396], [30371], [25], [3567], [The Thermonuclear smoke devil resides in the Smoke devil dungeon, just to the south west of Castle Wars.

The Raging Echo of Thermy does not require a slayer task to kill.], [1], [4], [Thermonuclear Smoke Devil], [93 Slayer]]
4222 85 [[30], [30397], [30380], [25], [3575], [The Grotesque Guardians are found on the Slayer Tower's rooftop, whose entrance is found on the 3rd floor.

The Raging Echo of Grotesque Guardians does not require a slayer task to kill, and also does not respawn.], [1], [5], [Grotesque Guardians], [75 Slayer]]
4223 85 [[15], [30398], [30384], [15], [3584], [The Corrupted Hunllef is accessible within the Gauntlet, located in Prifddinas.

The Raging Echo of Hunllef skips the preparation phase.], [2], [7], [Corrupted Hunllef], [Gauntlet completion]]
4224 85 [[30], [30399], [30388, 30382], [25, 25], [3557], [The King Black Dragon can be found in the Wilderness, just west of the Lava maze.], [1], [11], [King Black Dragon], None]
4225 85 [[1], [30400], [30390], [15], [3579], [Hespori is located in the Farming Guild.

The Raging Echo of Hespori does not require a fully grown hespori to be fought.], [1], [20], [Hespori], [65 Farming (Boostable)]]
4226 85 [[1], [30401], [30369, 30386], [5, 7], [881], [Sol Heredit is located at the final wave of the colosseum in varlamore.

The Raging Echo of Sol Heredit is fought immediately, skipping the waves.], [3], [21], [Sol Heredit], None]
